items.title: Understanding subclinical heart disease and cytokine profile in cardiorheumatic care of systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) affects several organs and systems. The involvement of the cardiovascular system confers high morbidity and mortality in patients, so the detection of possible subclinical or advanced cardiac involvement at the time of diagnosis will lead to preventive solutions according to the degree and type of cardiovascular involvement. New echocardiographic techniques such as left ventricular global longitudinal strain (LV-GLS) allow the detection systolic dysfunction of the LV before the onset of symptoms secondary to heart failure. The objective of the study was to compare the GLS strain of the LV of asymptomatic patients with diagnosed SLE with a healthy control (HC) group. This prospective cross-sectional comparative study included asymptomatic patients with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and no history or clinical evidence of heart failure. All participants underwent transthoracic echocardiography, and left ventricular systolic function was assessed using three-dimensional left ventricular ejection fraction (3D-LVEF) and global longitudinal strain (GLS). Inflammatory status was evaluated by measuring circulating levels of IL-4, IL-2, CXCL10, CXCL8, IL-1β, TNF-α, CCL2, IL-17A, IL-6, IL-10, IFN-γ, IL-12(p70), and active free TGF-β1. Echocardiographic and inflammatory parameters were compared with those of a self-reported healthy control group." A total of 40 participants were included, all of whom were women. Compared with self-reported healthy controls, patients with SLE exhibited lower left ventricular global longitudinal strain (LV-GLS; p = 0.018), left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF; p = 0.027), and left atrial strain during both the reservoir (p = 0.0157) and conduit phases (p = 0.0075). In contrast, patients with SLE had greater interventricular septal thickness (p = 0.0001), posterior wall thickness (p = 0.0055), relative wall thickness (p = 0.03), left ventricular mass index (p = 0.0034), and a higher prevalence of concentric remodeling (p < 0.0001). Among patients with active SLE, IL-12(p70) levels were positively correlated with interventricular septal thickness (r = 0.76, p = 0.0112). Compared to healthy controls, asymptomatic patients with SLE and no history of heart failure had lower LV-GLS and LVEF values, despite preserving left ventricular systolic function. Higher IL-12 (p70) levels were associated with greater interventricular septum thickness in patients with active SLE.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮心脏风湿病护理中的亚临床心脏病和细胞因子谱理解
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）影响多个器官和系统。心血管系统的受累导致患者高发病率和死亡率，因此在诊断时检测可能的亚临床或晚期心脏受累将根据心血管受累的程度和类型采取预防性解决方案。新的超声心动图技术如左心室整体纵向应变（LV-GLS）允许在心力衰竭继发症状出现前检测左心室收缩功能障碍。该研究旨在比较诊断为SLE的无症状患者与健康对照组（HC）的左心室GLS应变。这项前瞻性横断面比较研究纳入了无症状的系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者，无心力衰竭病史或临床证据。所有参与者均接受经胸超声心动图检查，并使用三维左心室射血分数（3D-LVEF）和整体纵向应变（GLS）评估左心室收缩功能。通过测量循环中IL-4、IL-2、CXCL10、CXCL8、IL-1β、TNF-α、CCL2、IL-17A、IL-6、IL-10、IFN-γ、IL-12(p70)和活性游离TGF-β1的水平来评估炎症状态。将超声心动图和炎症参数与自我报告的健康对照组进行比较。共纳入40名参与者，均为女性。与自我报告的健康对照组相比，SLE患者表现出较低的左心室整体纵向应变（LV-GLS；p = 0.018）、左心室射血分数（LVEF；p = 0.027）以及左心房储库期（p = 0.0157）和管道期（p = 0.0075）应变。相反，SLE患者具有更大的室间隔厚度（p = 0.0001）、后壁厚度（p = 0.0055）、相对室壁厚度（p = 0.03）、左心室质量指数（p = 0.0034）以及更高的向心性重构患病率（p < 0.0001）。在活动性SLE患者中，IL-12(p70)水平与室间隔厚度呈正相关（r = 0.76，p = 0.0112）。与健康对照组相比，无心力衰竭病史的无症状SLE患者尽管保留了左心室收缩功能，但LV-GLS和LVEF值较低。在活动性SLE患者中，较高的IL-12(p70)水平与更大的室间隔厚度相关。

items.title: Towards a proteomic plasma biomarker panel for diagnosing vasculitis remission.
items.abstract: Active anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic autoantibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis (AAV) requires intensive immunosuppressive therapy, but continued treatment beyond remission risks serious harm. Because reliable biomarkers of remission are lacking, clinicians often prolong cost-intensive and toxic therapy unnecessarily. Here, we explore the plasma proteome to identify reliable biomarkers of disease remission in patients with AAV, adjusting for patient characteristics and clinical variables. Applying a two-tiered proteomics strategy that combines global discovery with targeted validation, we identify a protein signature of remission. We then implement the resulting 7-protein panel in a targeted mass spectrometry-based assay and confirm its diagnostic performance in an independent patient cohort. The panel consistently outperforms routine markers such as C-reactive protein and ANCA titer. Our findings suggest that this 7-protein panel provides a starting point for developing a clinical tool to support decision-making, with the potential to reduce treatment-related burden, mitigate toxicity, and lower healthcare costs. More broadly, our confounder-controlled proteomics approach provides a scalable blueprint for biomarker discovery in complex inflammatory diseases.

items.titleZh: 迈向诊断血管炎缓解的蛋白质组血浆生物标志物组合
items.abstractZh: 活动性抗中性粒细胞胞浆自身抗体（ANCA）相关性血管炎（AAV）需要强化免疫抑制治疗，但缓解后继续治疗会带来严重风险。由于缺乏可靠的缓解生物标志物，临床医生常常不必要地延长成本高昂且具有毒性的治疗。在此，我们探索血浆蛋白质组，以识别AAV患者疾病缓解的可靠生物标志物，并调整患者特征和临床变量。采用结合全局发现与靶向验证的两层蛋白质组学策略，我们识别出缓解的蛋白质特征。随后，我们在基于靶向质谱的检测中实施所得的7蛋白组合，并在独立患者队列中确认其诊断性能。该组合始终优于C反应蛋白和ANCA滴度等常规标志物。我们的研究结果表明，这7蛋白组合为开发支持临床决策的工具提供了起点，具有减少治疗相关负担、减轻毒性和降低医疗成本的潜力。更广泛地说，我们的混杂因素控制蛋白质组学方法为复杂炎症性疾病中的生物标志物发现提供了可扩展的蓝图。

items.title: A phase 2 trial of rilzabrutinib in IgG4-related disease.
items.abstract: The objective of the article is to assess the efficacy and safety of rilzabrutinib, an oral, reversible inhibitor of Bruton's tyrosine kinase, in participants with IgG4-related disease. This Phase 2a (NCT04520451) open-label, 52-week study enrolled 2 cohorts of participants with IgG4-related disease: Cohort A (participants who had failed or were intolerant to rituximab) and Cohort B (participants enrolled agnostic to rituximab history). Participants received rilzabrutinib plus a 2-to-4-week glucocorticoid (GC) taper followed by rilzabrutinib alone for up to 52 weeks. Primary endpoints were the proportion of participants without disease flare following first rilzabrutinib dose until the end of treatment and safety. This study included 27 participants (Cohort A: 13; Cohort B: 14). At the end of treatment, 70.4% (19/27) of participants were flare-free and off GCs/immunosuppressants. Disease activity (mean [SD]), measured by IgG4-related disease Responder Index, decreased by 8.3 (5.8) at week 12 in both cohorts and by 10.7 (6.3) in participants who completed 52 weeks of rilzabrutinib (14/17). Serious treatment-emergent adverse events (TEAEs) occurred in 2 participants, 1 resulting in death, but both events were judged unrelated to the study drug. The most frequent TEAEs were diarrhoea, 40.7% (11/27); coronavirus disease 2019, 18.5% (5/27); and dizziness, 18.5% (5/27). Rilzabrutinib had an acceptable safety profile in patients with IgG4-related disease who had failed/ intolerant to rituximab and who were rituximab-naïve. Most participants discontinued GCs successfully without disease flares and exhibited sustained disease activity reduction. Further investigation of this potential alternative to B-cell-depleting therapies is needed in larger, long-term, placebo-controlled trials.

items.titleZh: 利扎布替尼治疗IgG4相关疾病的2期试验
items.abstractZh: 本文旨在评估口服、可逆性布鲁顿酪氨酸激酶抑制剂利扎布替尼在IgG4相关疾病参与者中的疗效和安全性。这项2a期（NCT04520451）开放标签、52周研究纳入了2组IgG4相关疾病参与者：A组（利妥昔单抗治疗失败或不耐受的参与者）和B组（不考虑利妥昔单抗治疗史的参与者）。参与者接受利扎布替尼联合2至4周糖皮质激素（GC）减量，随后单独使用利扎布替尼至52周。主要终点是首次利扎布替尼给药后至治疗结束时无疾病发作的参与者比例及安全性。本研究共纳入27名参与者（A组：13名；B组：14名）。治疗结束时，70.4%（19/27）的参与者无发作且停用GC/免疫抑制剂。通过IgG4相关疾病应答指数测量的疾病活动度（均值[SD]）在两组中于第12周下降8.3（5.8），在完成52周利扎布替尼治疗的参与者（14/17）中下降10.7（6.3）。2名参与者发生严重治疗期间不良事件（TEAEs），其中1例导致死亡，但两例事件均被判断与研究药物无关。最常见的TEAEs为腹泻（40.7%，11/27）、2019冠状病毒病（18.5%，5/27）和头晕（18.5%，5/27）。利扎布替尼在利妥昔单抗治疗失败/不耐受及未使用过利妥昔单抗的IgG4相关疾病患者中具有可接受的安全性。大多数参与者成功停用GC且无疾病发作，并表现出持续的疾病活动度降低。需要在更大规模、长期、安慰剂对照试验中进一步研究这种B细胞耗竭疗法的潜在替代方案。

items.title: Harnessing AI and social media to understand real-world patient experiences in SLE.
items.abstract: To apply large language models (LLMs) to Reddit posts referencing SLE to identify patient-expressed unmet medical needs, symptom experiences and healthcare challenges, demonstrating how artificial intelligence-enabled social media listening complements traditional patient-experience research. We extracted 4633 posts from 10 SLE-related Reddit communities using the public Reddit Application Programming Interface (October-November 2025). After removing duplicates, promotional content and posts with insufficient information, 2603 posts remained. We developed a thematic codebook through manual review of 300 posts and refined it iteratively. Two state-of-the-art LLMs (Gemini 3.0 and GPT-5.2) were evaluated for automated thematic labelling using per cent agreement, Cohen's κ and performance against a human-annotated reference set (n=100). The best-performing model was then used to quantify theme prevalence across the full dataset, followed by qualitative review of representative narratives. GPT-5.2 demonstrated higher performance (F1=0.844) than Gemini 3.0 (F1=0.811), with substantial intermodel agreement across main themes (mean κ=0.71). Posts reflected multidimensional experiences. The most frequent subtheme was Advice Seeking (84.1%), followed by Emotional Coping (55.6%). Common symptom-related themes included Pain (37.2%), Other Symptom Presentations (37.6%), Fatigue (24.7%) and Acute or Worsening Flares (30.2%). Diagnostic uncertainty was prominent, including testing and results confusion (24.0%) and emotional impact of uncertainty and disease progression (33.0%). Qualitative review highlighted emotional and social burden, reliance on peer communities for advice and shared experiences, and difficulty managing complex treatment regimens. LLM-enabled social media listening offers a scalable method for synthesising large volumes of unstructured patient narratives, providing timely insights into lived experiences and unmet needs among individuals discussing lupus online. Findings align with established qualitative literature while highlighting persistent gaps in patient education, communication and care coordination. This analytical framework can be extended to other disease areas to support patient-centred care, measurement development and evidence generation relevant to therapeutic and health outcomes research.

items.title: ANCA-associated vasculitis: From immunopathogenesis to diagnosis and toward precision therapy.
items.abstract: Anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis (AAV) comprises a group of rare, potentially life-threatening autoimmune disorders characterized by necrotizing inflammation of small vessels. Over recent decades, remarkable advances have been made in unraveling its immunopathogenesis, emphasizing the interplay between genetic predisposition, environmental triggers, loss of immune tolerance, neutrophil extracellular trap formation, and complement-mediated neutrophil activation. This review provides an integrative synthesis of recent mechanistic and clinical insights into AAV, bridging fundamental immunology with translational and therapeutic advances. Based on an extensive literature search of PubMed and Scopus, studies were selected according to methodological quality and clinical relevance. Distinct ANCA specificities, proteinase 3 (PR3) and myeloperoxidase (MPO), define overlapping yet prognostically divergent subsets, with PR3-ANCA linked to relapsing multisystem disease and MPO-ANCA to renal involvement and progression to kidney failure. Therapeutic paradigms have evolved from cyclophosphamide-based induction toward rituximab-centered and glucocorticoid-sparing regimens, with avacopan and mepolizumab further improving efficacy and safety profiles. Despite five-year survival rates exceeding 85%, long-term morbidity persists, driven by relapse and treatment-related toxicity. However, precision therapy in AAV remains incomplete, as current treatment selection is still guided mainly by disease severity, organ involvement, relapse risk, comorbidities, renal histology, and glucocorticoid-toxicity risk rather than by validated molecular biomarkers. Emerging data on complement activation, urinary inflammatory biomarkers, B-cell kinetics, and tissue-based transcriptomic profiling may refine disease endotyping and individualized monitoring. Collectively, these advances herald a transition from empirical immunosuppression toward biologically informed, precision-oriented care in vasculitis.

items.title: Interleukin-33 drives abnormal bone remodeling in ankylosing spondylitis via inhibition of osteoclast differentiation.
items.abstract: Interleukin (IL)-33 has been shown to be abnormally expressed in patients diagnosed with ankylosing spondylitis (AS). However, the source of IL-33 and the mechanism(s) through which IL-33 affects bone metabolism in AS remains unclear. Serum IL-33 levels were measured in patients diagnosed with AS and healthy controls (HCs). Primary human enthesis cells were isolated from surgically harvested human enthesis tissues to evaluate IL-33 expression under tumor necrosis factor (TNF) and IL-17A stimulation using bulk RNA sequencing and Western blotting. The therapeutic potential of IL-33 in curdlan-treated SKG mice to mimic AS was assessed using anti-IL-33 neutralizing antibodies. The effects of IL-33 on bone remodeling were further explored using osteoblast and osteoclast differentiation assays. Serum IL-33 levels were significantly elevated in patients with AS with a high inflammatory burden and were positively correlated with TNF, IL-17A, and radiographic progression. In AS enthesis tissues and primary cells, IL-33 expression was markedly higher than that in HCs. Notably, synergistic stimulation by TNF and IL-17A significantly upregulated IL-33 at both the transcriptomic and protein levels, particularly in AS-derived cells. In vivo, anti-IL-33 treatment significantly attenuated clinical arthritis severity, enthesitis scores, and enthesophyte formation in a mouse model of AS. Mechanistically, IL-33 significantly inhibited osteoclastogenesis by suppressing the p38 MAPK-NFATc1 signaling pathway in osteoclast precursors. These findings demonstrate that IL-33 is a key mediator that links systemic inflammation to local enthesopathy and pathological bone formation in patients with AS. Accordingly, the IL-33/p38/NFATc1 axis may represent a novel therapeutic target for modulating the pathological bone remodeling characteristics of AS.

items.title: [The subjective experience of employment of young adults with rheumatoid arthritis on the general labour market - A qualitative study].
items.abstract: The search for inclusion and participation of people with disabilities is increasingly becoming the focus of research in the context of demographic development and the associated labour shortage. The research situation in the context of chronic diseases is considered to be low in the national area. This applies in particular to rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in young adulthood. Existing work points to the importance of adaptations in the field of work and working time. As part of the study, 17 individual interviews were conducted with young adults aged 18 to 35. These were transcribed and analyzed using the content-structuring qualitative content analysis. As a result of the relapsing disease activity, physical limitations occurred in the affected persons in their daily work routine. These were aggravated by accompanying symptoms of the disease. With regard to the work situation, it was evident that a lack of flexible working hours, work breaks and places as well as the lack of ergonomic workplace design and accessibility at the workplace could contribute to the physical limitations of the disease. Socio-psychological challenges, such as incomprehension and prejudices on the part of colleagues and/or managers with regard to a chronic illness, led to further psychosocial difficulties in those affected. The present study provides initial insights into the individual-specific and work-related challenges of young adults with rheumatic disease. With reference to the multilevel model of occupational inclusion, the individual problems of the affected employees can be traced back to multiple influencing factors. Das Bemühen um Inklusion und Teilhabe von Menschen mit Beeinträchtigung rückt im Rahmen der demografischen Entwicklung und dem damit verbundenen Mangel an Arbeitskräften zunehmend in den Fokus der Forschung. Die Forschungslage im Kontext chronischer Erkrankungen ist dabei im nationalen Raum als gering zu bewerten. Dies gilt insbesondere für die rheumatoide Arthritis (RA) im jungen Erwachsenenalter. Bestehende Arbeiten verweisen auf die Bedeutung von Adaptionen im Bereich Arbeitsplatz und Arbeitszeit hin.In der Arbeit wurden 17 Einzelinterviews mit jungen Erwachsenen im Alter von 18 bis 35 Jahren durchgeführt. Diese wurden transkribiert und anschließend anhand der inhaltlich strukturierenden qualitativen Inhaltsanalyse analysiert.Personenbezogen entstehen bedingt durch die schubweise Krankheitsaktivität, körperliche Einschränkungen bei den Betroffenen im Arbeitsalltag. Diese können durch Begleitsymptome der Erkrankung verschärft werden. Hinsichtlich der Arbeitssituation zeigt sich, dass fehlende Flexibilisierungsmaßnahmen der Arbeitszeiten, -pausen und -orte sowie fehlende ergonomische Arbeitsplatzgestaltungen und Barrierefreiheit am Arbeitsplatz, die körperlichen Einschränkungen der Erkrankung begünstigen können. Sozialpsychologische Herausforderungen, wie bspw. Unverständnis und Vorurteile seitens der Kolleg*innen und/oder Führungskräfte hinsichtlich einer chronischen Erkrankung führen zu weiteren psychosozialen Schwierigkeiten bei den Betroffenen.Die Forschungsarbeit bietet erste Erkenntnisse über personenspezifische- und arbeitssituative Herausforderungen von jungen Erwachsenen mit einer rheumatischen Erkrankung. Bezogen auf das Mehrebenenmodell zur beruflichen Inklusion, sind die individuellen Probleme der betroffenen Arbeitnehmenden auf multiple Einflussfaktoren zurückzuführen.

items.titleZh: 年轻成年类风湿关节炎患者在普通劳动力市场就业的主观体验——一项定性研究
items.abstractZh: 在人口发展及随之而来的劳动力短缺背景下，对残疾人包容和参与的追求日益成为研究焦点。在国家层面，慢性疾病相关的研究状况被认为较低，尤其是年轻成年期的类风湿关节炎（RA）。现有研究指出了工作场所和工作时间调整的重要性。本研究对17名18至35岁的年轻成年人进行了个人访谈。访谈内容被转录，并采用内容结构化的定性内容分析法进行分析。由于疾病的活动性复发，受影响者在日常工作生活中出现身体限制，这些限制可能因疾病的伴随症状而加剧。就工作状况而言，缺乏灵活的工作时间、工间休息和地点，以及缺乏符合人体工程学的工作场所设计和无障碍设施，可能加剧疾病带来的身体限制。社会心理挑战，如同事和/或管理者对慢性疾病的不理解和偏见，导致受影响者进一步出现心理社会困难。本研究初步揭示了患有风湿性疾病的年轻成年人在个人和工作相关方面的挑战。参照职业包容的多层次模型，受影响员工的个体问题可追溯到多重影响因素。

items.title: Factors associated with renal relapse in lupus nephritis after remission: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.abstract: High relapse rates in lupus nephritis (LN) remain clinically challenging and may contribute to progression toward end-stage renal disease. This study synthesized observational evidence on factors associated with renal relapse after LN remission. PubMed, Embase, Web of Science, the Cochrane Library, CNKI, CBM andWanfang were searched from inception to 10 October 2025. Study quality was assessed using the Newcastle-Ottawa Scale. Remission and relapse definitions were extracted, and unadjusted odds ratios, mean differences, and adjusted hazard ratios were interpreted separately. Thirteen cohort studies involving 2269 patients were included. Definitions of complete remission, partial remission, proteinuric relapse, and nephritic relapse varied across studies. In pooled adjusted analyses, younger age and anti-dsDNA positivity were associated with relapse, although anti-dsDNA was based on two studies. Pooled unadjusted analyses suggested associations for poor adherence, hematuria, elevated serum creatinine, uric acid, reduced albumin, low C3, anti-SSB positivity, and Class IV or mixed Class V + IV pathology. Class V showed a lower observed relapse likelihood, while Class II was borderline and heterogeneous. BUN, ESR, C1q, anti-Sm antibodies, antiphospholipid antibodies, lupus anticoagulant, and SLEDAI were supported mainly by single-study evidence. Several variables were associated with post-remission renal relapse in LN, but evidence strength and outcome definitions differed across studies. These findings should be interpreted as observational associations and candidate monitoring markers rather than validated independent prognostic markers. Prospective studies with standardized remission and relapse definitions and adjustment strategies are needed.

items.titleZh: 狼疮性肾炎缓解后肾脏复发的相关因素：系统评价与荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 狼疮性肾炎（LN）的高复发率在临床上仍具挑战性，并可能促进终末期肾病的进展。本研究综合了关于LN缓解后肾脏复发相关因素的观察性证据。检索了PubMed、Embase、Web of Science、Cochrane图书馆、CNKI、CBM和万方数据库，时间从建库至2025年10月10日。采用纽卡斯尔-渥太华量表评估研究质量。提取缓解和复发的定义，并分别解释未校正的比值比、均数差和校正后的风险比。共纳入13项队列研究，涉及2269例患者。各研究对完全缓解、部分缓解、蛋白尿复发和肾炎性复发的定义存在差异。在合并的校正分析中，年龄较小和抗dsDNA阳性与复发相关，但抗dsDNA仅基于两项研究。合并的未校正分析提示，依从性差、血尿、血清肌酐升高、尿酸升高、白蛋白降低、C3降低、抗SSB阳性以及IV型或混合V+IV型病理与复发相关。V型观察到的复发可能性较低，而II型为临界且异质性较大。BUN、ESR、C1q、抗Sm抗体、抗磷脂抗体、狼疮抗凝物和SLEDAI主要基于单研究证据。多个变量与LN缓解后肾脏复发相关，但各研究的证据强度和结局定义存在差异。这些发现应解释为观察性关联和候选监测标志物，而非经过验证的独立预后标志物。需要采用标准化缓解和复发定义及校正策略的前瞻性研究。

items.title: Balancing Act: The Dual Roles of BAFF in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
items.abstract: In systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and other autoimmune diseases, B-cell activating factor (BAFF) and a proliferation-inducing ligand (APRIL) play critical roles through three receptors, i.e., BAFF-Receptor (BAFF-R), transmembrane activator and calcium-modulator and cyclophilin ligand (CAML) interactor (TACI), and B-cell maturation antigen (BCMA), promoting the survival of self-reactive B cells and supporting their differentiation into antibody-producing cells. Several biologic therapies with anti-BAFF and anti-BAFF/APRIL agents induce profound suppression of immunoglobulin production and B-cell survival with variable safety profiles. While belimumab has demonstrated significant improvement of overall disease activity in clinical trials, some cases of de novo lupus nephritis have been reported suggesting a potential lack of protection in certain cases. The sustained reduction in B cell populations expressing regulatory markers, alongside a rapid decline in IL-10 levels following belimumab initiation, suggests that BAFF may have a previously underappreciated role in supporting the development or function of regulatory B cells (Bregs). Given the complex receptor interactions of BAFF and APRIL, as well as the heterogeneous phenotype of regulatory B cells and their different mechanisms for regulating the immune response, the involvement of BAFF in regulatory immune responses remains difficult to fully elucidate. This review explores the current evidence on the anti-BAFF/APRIL therapies and examines the unresolved question of whether BAFF exerts a context-dependent role in supporting regulatory B cell function.

items.title: Risk of misclassification of rheumatoid arthritis activity in patients with depression: a prospective ultrasound study.
items.abstract: Depression is common in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) and may inflate patient-reported outcomes, leading to overestimation of disease activity and misclassification of treatment response. We evaluated the impact of depression severity on RA disease activity assessment at advanced therapy initiation and at follow-up, using musculoskeletal ultrasound (US), to distinguish objective synovial inflammation from symptom-driven disease burden. We prospectively evaluated disease activity measures across depression severity categories in RA patients initiating biologic or targeted synthetic DMARD (bDMARD/tsDMARD) therapy. Depression severity was assessed using the Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ). Clinical examination and US assessment of 36 joints were performed at baseline, three and six months. Among 164 RA patients, 110 (67.1%) had no or mild depressive symptoms, and 54 (32.9%) had moderate-to-severe depression. At baseline, patients with moderate-to-severe depression reported higher disease activity, including higher tender joint counts (13.5 vs 7; p = 0.003), higher pain VAS (7 vs 4; p < 0.001), and higher DAS28-ESR scores (5.71 vs 4.45; p = 0.005). In contrast, objective inflammatory measures were similar between groups, including swollen joint counts (6 vs 5; p = 0.742) and US synovitis scores (GLOESS: 22 vs 25; p = 0.371). At three and six months, objective disease activity improved similarly across depression groups. Subjective outcomes also improved over time, but residual tenderness and disability remained more prominent in the depression group. Depression contributes to increased symptom burden independently of inflammatory disease activity in RA. Incorporating mental health assessment alongside objective measures such as US assessment is important to avoid overestimating disease severity and misjudging treatment response. Keypoints • Depression inflates patient-reported rheumatoid arthritis disease activity without a corresponding increase in objective inflammation. • Ultrasound-detected synovitis and swollen joint counts were similar across depression severity, despite higher DAS28 and pain scores in depressed patients. • Integrating ultrasound-based clinical assessment in patients with depression may reduce disease activity misclassification and prevent inappropriate treatment escalation. Key Indexing Terms: Rheumatoid Arthritis, Depression, Ultrasonography.

items.titleZh: 抑郁症患者类风湿关节炎活动性误分类风险：一项前瞻性超声研究
items.abstractZh: 抑郁症在类风湿关节炎（RA）中常见，可能夸大患者报告结局，导致疾病活动性高估和治疗反应误分类。我们评估了抑郁症严重程度对RA疾病活动性评估的影响，在先进治疗启动时和随访中，使用肌肉骨骼超声（US）区分客观滑膜炎与症状驱动的疾病负担。我们前瞻性评估了启动生物制剂或靶向合成DMARD（bDMARD/tsDMARD）治疗的RA患者中不同抑郁严重程度类别的疾病活动性指标。使用患者健康问卷（PHQ）评估抑郁严重程度。在基线、3个月和6个月时进行临床检查和36个关节的US评估。在164名RA患者中，110名（67.1%）无或轻度抑郁症状，54名（32.9%）有中重度抑郁。基线时，中重度抑郁患者报告更高的疾病活动性，包括更高的压痛关节计数（13.5 vs 7；p = 0.003）、更高的疼痛VAS（7 vs 4；p < 0.001）和更高的DAS28-ESR评分（5.71 vs 4.45；p = 0.005）。相反，客观炎症指标在组间相似，包括肿胀关节计数（6 vs 5；p = 0.742）和US滑膜炎评分（GLOESS：22 vs 25；p = 0.371）。在3个月和6个月时，客观疾病活动性在各抑郁组中改善相似。主观结局也随时间改善，但抑郁组中残留的压痛和残疾仍更突出。抑郁症独立于RA炎症疾病活动性导致症状负担增加。将心理健康评估与客观测量（如US评估）相结合，对于避免高估疾病严重程度和误判治疗反应非常重要。关键点：• 抑郁症夸大患者报告的类风湿关节炎疾病活动性，而客观炎症无相应增加。• 尽管抑郁患者DAS28和疼痛评分更高，但超声检测的滑膜炎和肿胀关节计数在不同抑郁严重程度间相似。• 在抑郁症患者中整合基于超声的临床评估可减少疾病活动性误分类并防止不适当的治疗升级。关键索引术语：类风湿关节炎，抑郁症，超声检查。

items.title: Intranasal dexmedetomidine vs. nitrous oxide for procedural sedation in juvenile idiopathic arthritis (INDEXJIA): a randomized crossover clinical trial.
items.abstract: This study aims to compare intranasal dexmedetomidine with inhaled nitrous oxide for procedural pain relief and sedation during intra-articular injections in a pediatric rheumatology outpatient clinic. Patients from 1 to 18 years-of-age requiring 1-5 intra-articular injections were randomized to receive 2 µg/kg intranasal dexmedetomidine or inhaled nitrous oxide in the first visit. When the patient required subsequent treatment visit, the other sedative was administered. The primary outcome was patient-reported pain immediately after recovery from sedation. Hemodynamic and respiratory parameters, level of sedation and patient's pain assessed by the parent, rheumatologist, and nurse were secondary outcomes. Out of 119 eligible patients, 68 were included, and 43 received both medications at two separate visits. Overall pain experience was mild and did not differ between dexmedetomidine and nitrous oxide in patient-reported pain immediately after the procedure (difference, 0.2; 95% CI - 0.7 to 1.2, p = 0.65) but the patients recalled milder pain after nitrous oxide in the follow-up survey (difference, - 1.3; 95% CI - 2.3 to - 0.3; p = 0.01). Milder pain was reported during the second visit compared to the first visit regardless of the sedative used (difference, - 1.2; 95% CI - 2.1 to - 0.2; p = 0.02). In the follow-up survey, majority (69%) of patients would prefer nitrous oxide to dexmedetomidine for sedation in future.  Both intranasal dexmedetomidine and inhaled nitrous oxide offered effective analgosedation for intra-articular injections in children. Nitrous oxide resulted in better patient experience and became their preference for future sedation. Trial registration: ClinicalTrials.gov TRN: NCT03069638. https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT03069638 . The date of registration 2016-12-20. • Children suffering juvenile idiopathic arthritis often require repeated intra-articular injections. • Procedural sedation is being used during these procedures. • When intranasal dexmedetomidine and nitrous oxide was compared in a crossover design both agents provided effective analgosedation without difference in patient-reported pain immediately after the procedure. • Despite this, most patients favored nitrous oxide for future sedation.

items.titleZh: 鼻内右美托咪定与一氧化二氮用于幼年特发性关节炎程序性镇静（INDEXJIA）：一项随机交叉临床试验。
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在比较鼻内右美托咪定与吸入一氧化二氮在儿科风湿病门诊关节内注射过程中的程序性疼痛缓解和镇静效果。1至18岁需要1-5次关节内注射的患者被随机分配在首次就诊时接受2 µg/kg鼻内右美托咪定或吸入一氧化二氮。当患者需要后续治疗就诊时，给予另一种镇静药物。主要结局是患者从镇静中恢复后立即报告的疼痛。次要结局包括血流动力学和呼吸参数、镇静水平以及由家长、风湿病学家和护士评估的患者疼痛。在119名符合条件的患者中，68名被纳入，43名在两个不同就诊中接受了两种药物。总体疼痛体验轻微，右美托咪定和一氧化二氮在患者术后立即报告的疼痛方面无差异（差异，0.2；95% CI -0.7至1.2，p = 0.65），但在随访调查中，患者回忆一氧化二氮后的疼痛更轻（差异，-1.3；95% CI -2.3至-0.3；p = 0.01）。无论使用何种镇静药物，第二次就诊报告的疼痛比第一次就诊更轻（差异，-1.2；95% CI -2.1至-0.2；p = 0.02）。在随访调查中，大多数（69%）患者未来更倾向于使用一氧化二氮而非右美托咪定进行镇静。鼻内右美托咪定和吸入一氧化二氮均为儿童关节内注射提供了有效的镇痛镇静。一氧化二氮带来了更好的患者体验，并成为他们未来镇静的首选。试验注册：ClinicalTrials.gov TRN: NCT03069638。https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT03069638 。注册日期2016-12-20。• 患有幼年特发性关节炎的儿童经常需要反复关节内注射。• 在这些操作中使用了程序性镇静。• 当在交叉设计中比较鼻内右美托咪定和一氧化二氮时，两种药物均提供了有效的镇痛镇静，患者术后立即报告的疼痛无差异。• 尽管如此，大多数患者未来更倾向于使用一氧化二氮进行镇静。

items.title: Expression of VISTA on peripheral blood mononuclear cells in Systemic lupus erythematosus: association with disease activity and treatment status.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a heterogeneous autoimmune disease characterized by autoantibody production and multi-organ involvement due to dysregulated immune responses. Ongoing research aims to understand the underlying mechanisms of this immune dysregulation, with particular interest in immune checkpoint molecules such as VISTA (encoded by the VSIR gene), which exerts context-dependent immunomodulatory effects. We analyzed a large-scale single-cell RNA-seq (scRNA-seq) dataset (GSE174188) comprising 261 samples (162 SLE cases, 99 controls) to investigate VSIR expression patterns across peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) subsets in SLE versus controls, using bioinformatics tools. Additionally, fresh PBMCs were isolated from SLE patients and healthy controls, and VSIR mRNA levels were quantified by RT-qPCR in treatment-naïve cases and those receiving Prednisolone, Hydroxychloroquine, or supplementary medications. Associations between VSIR expression and clinical/demographic parameters, including disease activity index, were also evaluated. scRNA-seq analysis revealed significantly upregulated VSIR expression in monocytes from SLE patients compared to healthy controls. In contrast, pseudobulk differential expression analysis of the entire PBMC population, corroborated by RT-qPCR on fresh samples, demonstrated downregulation of VSIR in SLE cases overall (log₂ fold change = -1.23). Notably, VSIR expression differed across treatment groups, with the lowest levels observed in treatment-naïve patients and higher levels in those receiving first-line therapies (prednisolone and hydroxychloroquine). Furthermore, VSIR expression exhibited a significant negative correlation with SLE disease activity index. This study demonstrates decreased VSIR expression in the whole PBMC population in SLE patients, suggesting a potential role in disease pathogenesis processes possibly through altered immune checkpoint regulation. Moreover, VSIR expression was associated with treatment status, with higher expression observed in patients receiving standard first-line therapies.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮外周血单个核细胞中VISTA的表达：与疾病活动性和治疗状态的关系
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种异质性自身免疫性疾病，其特征是由于免疫应答失调导致自身抗体产生和多器官受累。正在进行的研究旨在了解这种免疫失调的潜在机制，特别关注免疫检查点分子如VISTA（由VSIR基因编码），该分子发挥环境依赖性的免疫调节作用。我们分析了一个大规模单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）数据集（GSE174188），包含261个样本（162例SLE病例，99例对照），使用生物信息学工具研究SLE与对照之间外周血单个核细胞（PBMC）亚群中VSIR的表达模式。此外，从SLE患者和健康对照中分离新鲜PBMC，并通过RT-qPCR在未治疗病例以及接受泼尼松龙、羟氯喹或辅助药物治疗的患者中定量VSIR mRNA水平。还评估了VSIR表达与临床/人口统计学参数（包括疾病活动指数）之间的关联。scRNA-seq分析显示，与健康对照相比，SLE患者单核细胞中VSIR表达显著上调。相反，对整个PBMC群体的伪批量差异表达分析（经新鲜样本RT-qPCR证实）显示，SLE病例中VSIR总体下调（log₂倍变化 = -1.23）。值得注意的是，VSIR表达在不同治疗组之间存在差异，未治疗患者中表达水平最低，而接受一线治疗（泼尼松龙和羟氯喹）的患者中表达水平较高。此外，VSIR表达与SLE疾病活动指数呈显著负相关。本研究表明，SLE患者整个PBMC群体中VSIR表达降低，提示其可能通过改变免疫检查点调节在疾病发病过程中发挥潜在作用。此外，VSIR表达与治疗状态相关，接受标准一线治疗的患者中表达较高。

items.title: Concurrent psoriatic arthritis and autoimmune hepatitis in a patient with psoriasis: a case report.
items.abstract: Psoriasis is a chronic, autoimmune skin disorder that can be associated with systemic comorbidities, including psoriatic arthritis (PsA). The coexistence of psoriasis, PsA, and autoimmune hepatitis (AIH) is uncommon and may present diagnostic and therapeutic challenges. This case report highlights a patient with psoriasis who developed both PsA and AIH without prior immunosuppressive therapy. A 57-year-old Palestinian woman with longstanding plaque psoriasis presented with worsening skin lesions, progressive arthralgia involving both knees and ankles, chronic inflammatory low back pain, and persistently abnormal liver biochemistry. She had been diagnosed with psoriasis at age 49, which had been resistant to various treatments, including topical corticosteroids and phototherapy. One year before presentation, the patient developed progressive arthralgia, particularly in the knees, ankles, and lower back. Physical examination revealed swollen joints and limited range of motion. Laboratory tests indicated elevated liver enzymes, and autoimmune panel results were positive for antinuclear antibodies (ANA) and anti-smooth muscle antibodies (ASMA), raising suspicion for autoimmune hepatitis. A liver biopsy confirmed type 1 AIH, characterized by lymphocytic infiltration and plasma cell predominance. Cyclosporine 100 mg daily was initiated, atorvastatin was discontinued, and the patient was monitored clinically and biochemically. After 6 weeks, psoriasis severity improved markedly, joint symptoms decreased, and liver enzyme levels normalized. No treatment-related adverse effects were documented during the reported follow-up period. This case highlights the importance of considering autoimmune hepatitis in patients with psoriatic disease who develop persistent liver enzyme abnormalities, even in the absence of prior systemic immunosuppressive therapy. A multidisciplinary approach is important in such complex presentations, and cyclosporine may be a useful therapeutic option in selected patients requiring concomitant control of dermatologic, rheumatologic, and hepatic disease.

items.titleZh: 银屑病患者并发银屑病关节炎和自身免疫性肝炎：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 银屑病是一种慢性自身免疫性皮肤病，可伴有全身性合并症，包括银屑病关节炎（PsA）。银屑病、PsA和自身免疫性肝炎（AIH）共存的情况并不常见，可能带来诊断和治疗上的挑战。本病例报告重点介绍了一名银屑病患者在未接受免疫抑制治疗的情况下同时出现PsA和AIH。一名57岁的巴勒斯坦女性，患有长期斑块状银屑病，表现为皮肤病变加重、进行性关节痛（累及双膝和双踝）、慢性炎性下背痛以及持续异常的肝脏生化指标。她在49岁时被诊断为银屑病，对多种治疗（包括外用皮质类固醇和光疗）耐药。就诊前一年，患者出现进行性关节痛，尤其在膝盖、脚踝和下背部。体格检查显示关节肿胀和活动范围受限。实验室检查提示肝酶升高，自身免疫抗体谱显示抗核抗体（ANA）和抗平滑肌抗体（ASMA）阳性，怀疑自身免疫性肝炎。肝活检证实为1型AIH，特征为淋巴细胞浸润和浆细胞为主。开始使用环孢素100 mg每日一次，停用阿托伐他汀，并对患者进行临床和生化监测。6周后，银屑病严重程度显著改善，关节症状减轻，肝酶水平恢复正常。在报告的随访期间未记录到治疗相关不良事件。本病例强调了在银屑病患者中出现持续性肝酶异常时，即使既往未接受全身免疫抑制治疗，也应考虑自身免疫性肝炎的可能性。对于此类复杂表现，多学科方法至关重要，环孢素可能是需要同时控制皮肤、风湿和肝脏疾病的选定患者的有用治疗选择。

items.title: Cellular and molecular dysregulation of the esophageal epithelium in systemic sclerosis.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc) is a rare autoimmune disease characterized by vasculopathy and fibrosis of the skin and internal organs. Individuals with SSc often suffer from chronic acid reflux and dysphagia due to loss of esophageal motility. However, the pathogenesis of esophageal dysmotility in SSc is poorly understood. To determine whether distinct changes in esophageal epithelial cells contribute to esophageal involvement in SSc, we investigated the stratified squamous esophageal epithelium from proximal and distal biopsies using single-cell RNA sequencing (n=306,372 cells) in individuals with SSc compared those with gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) and healthy controls. The proportion of epithelial cells in the apical, superficial compartment of the esophageal epithelium was reduced in SSc (9.4% vs 21.6% in HCs). Differential gene expression in SSc was primarily limited to the superficial compartment (3,572 genes vs. 232 in all other compartments, based on pseudobulk analysis), with significant upregulation of extracellular matrix and keratinization genes. These cellular and molecular changes in SSc were highly correlated with those seen in GERD, indicating they were secondary to reflux; however, their magnitudes were more pronounced in the proximal esophagus, suggesting that esophageal dysmotility leads to greater proximal acid exposure, which may contribute to aspiration. SSc-specific gene dysregulation implicated immunoregulatory pathways likely pertinent to pathogenic mechanisms. Ligand-receptor interaction analysis revealed enhanced pro-fibrotic signaling between fibroblasts and epithelial cells in SSc. Cell type localization and SSc-specific changes were confirmed by spatial molecular imaging. By offering a comprehensive view of transcriptional dysregulation at single-cell resolution in human esophageal epithelial cells in SSc compared to GERD and healthy tissue, this work clarifies the state of epithelial cells in SSc-induced esophageal dysfunction.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症食管上皮的细胞和分子失调
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）是一种罕见的自身免疫性疾病，以血管病变和皮肤及内脏器官纤维化为特征。SSc患者常因食管动力丧失而遭受慢性胃酸反流和吞咽困难。然而，SSc中食管动力障碍的发病机制尚不清楚。为了确定食管上皮细胞的特定变化是否导致SSc的食管受累，我们通过单细胞RNA测序（n=306,372个细胞）研究了来自近端和远端活检的分层鳞状食管上皮，比较了SSc患者与胃食管反流病（GERD）患者和健康对照者。SSc中食管上皮顶端浅表区室的上皮细胞比例降低（9.4% vs 健康对照的21.6%）。SSc中的差异基因表达主要局限于浅表区室（基于伪批量分析，3,572个基因 vs 所有其他区室的232个），其中细胞外基质和角化基因显著上调。SSc中的这些细胞和分子变化与GERD中观察到的变化高度相关，表明它们是继发于反流；然而，它们在近端食管中的幅度更为显著，提示食管动力障碍导致更大的近端酸暴露，这可能促进误吸。SSc特异性基因失调涉及免疫调节通路，可能与致病机制相关。配体-受体相互作用分析揭示了SSc中成纤维细胞与上皮细胞之间增强的促纤维化信号传导。通过空间分子成像确认了细胞类型定位和SSc特异性变化。通过提供SSc与GERD及健康组织中人类食管上皮细胞在单细胞分辨率下的转录失调综合视图，本研究阐明了SSc诱导的食管功能障碍中上皮细胞的状态。

items.title: Identification of genetic variants in B cell expressed genes associated with systemic lupus erythematosus in African American females.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a complex autoimmune disease characterized by dysregulated B cell responses and pathogenic autoantibody production. Given the central role that B cells play in SLE pathogenesis, we aimed to characterize genetic variation within the B cell compartment of African ancestry (AFR) women with SLE who are disproportionately and more severely affected by SLE. Here, we analyzed RNA-seq data from a previously published study of high disease activity AFR SLE individuals and healthy controls (HC) to identify coding variants in B cells with potential functional consequence that may underpin disease. In this cohort, we identified 575 missense variants associated with 158 unique genes. While many variant-containing genes did not exhibit large transcriptional changes between cohorts, a subset occurred within genes involved in B cell signaling, activation, and differentiation. However, genes enriched in AFR SLE were consistently upregulated across multiple B cell subtypes, suggesting that variant-associated transcriptional changes occur broadly across the B cell compartment and not within a single subset. Among these, the TNFAIP3 variant rs2230926 was enriched in AFR SLE individuals and occurs at a substantially higher allele frequency in AFR populations. This study provides insights into genetic variation found within the B cell compartment that may contribute to immune dysregulation and disease pathogenesis in SLE in AFR populations.

items.titleZh: 非裔美国女性系统性红斑狼疮相关B细胞表达基因的遗传变异鉴定
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种复杂的自身免疫性疾病，其特征是B细胞反应失调和致病性自身抗体产生。鉴于B细胞在SLE发病机制中的核心作用，我们旨在表征非裔（AFR）SLE女性（该群体受SLE影响不成比例且更严重）B细胞区室内的遗传变异。在此，我们分析了先前发表的一项关于高疾病活动度AFR SLE个体和健康对照（HC）的RNA-seq研究数据，以鉴定B细胞中可能具有潜在功能后果并可能驱动疾病的编码变异。在该队列中，我们鉴定了575个错义变异，涉及158个独特基因。虽然许多含变异基因在队列间未表现出大的转录变化，但一部分出现在参与B细胞信号传导、激活和分化的基因中。然而，AFR SLE中富集的基因在多个B细胞亚型中一致上调，表明变异相关的转录变化广泛发生在B细胞区室中，而非单个亚群内。其中，TNFAIP3变异rs2230926在AFR SLE个体中富集，且在AFR人群中具有显著更高的等位基因频率。本研究提供了对B细胞区室内遗传变异的见解，这些变异可能有助于AFR人群中SLE的免疫失调和疾病发病机制。

items.title: Research Trends and Emerging Themes in Gut Microbiota-Systemic Lupus Erythematosus Research: A Bibliometric Analysis (2014-2025).
items.abstract: Growing evidence indicates that gut microbiota dysregulation plays a crucial role in the pathogenesis of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE); yet, a quantitative overview of research activity in this field is lacking. This study aimed to provide a bibliometric analysis of global research trends and thematic evolution concerning gut microbiota and SLE between 2014 and 2025. Relevant publications were retrieved from the Web of Science Core Collection and Scopus databases, and only original research articles and review articles published in English between January 1, 2014, and December 31, 2025, were included. Bibliometric analyses were performed using the bibliometrix package in R and CiteSpace to evaluate publication trends, country and institutional contributions, collaboration networks, keyword co-occurrence, and citation burst patterns. A total of 525 publications were included, comprising 248 original articles and 277 reviews. Annual publication output increased steadily, with accelerated growth after 2019 (annual growth rate of 121.20%), and 91 papers were published in 2025. China and the United States were the main contributors, accounting for more than half of the total publications, with field-normalized contributions of 1.0927 and 1.2268. The Medical University of South Carolina and Zhejiang Chinese Medical University were the most productive institutions (10 articles). Citation burst analysis showed that "Intestinal dysbiosis associated with systemic lupus erythematosus" laid the foundation for research in this field. Keyword analysis indicated a gradual shift from descriptive microbial characterization toward themes related to immune regulation and dysbiosis. In addition, increasing research attention has been directed toward microbiota-based therapeutic approaches in SLE. Research on gut microbiota in SLE has expanded substantially over the past decade, with an observable shift from association-based studies toward more mechanistic and translational research themes. Distinct regional research emphases were noted, highlighting the potential value of enhanced international and interdisciplinary collaboration in advancing research in this field. Cite this article as: Yang J, Wang J. Research trends and emerging themes in gut microbiota-systemic lupus erythematosus research: A bibliometric analysis (2014-2025). ArchRheumatol. 2026;41(3):249-257.

items.titleZh: 肠道微生物群与系统性红斑狼疮研究中的趋势与新兴主题：文献计量分析（2014-2025）
items.abstractZh: 越来越多的证据表明，肠道微生物群失调在系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的发病机制中起着关键作用；然而，该领域研究活动的定量概述尚缺乏。本研究旨在对2014年至2025年间肠道微生物群与SLE相关的全球研究趋势和主题演变进行文献计量分析。相关出版物检索自Web of Science核心合集和Scopus数据库，仅纳入2014年1月1日至2025年12月31日期间以英文发表的原著研究论文和综述文章。使用R语言中的bibliometrix包和CiteSpace进行文献计量分析，以评估出版趋势、国家和机构贡献、合作网络、关键词共现和引文爆发模式。共纳入525篇出版物，包括248篇原著文章和277篇综述。年出版量稳步增长，2019年后加速增长（年增长率为121.20%），2025年发表了91篇论文。中国和美国是主要贡献者，占出版物总数的一半以上，其领域标准化贡献分别为1.0927和1.2268。南卡罗来纳医科大学和浙江中医药大学是产出最多的机构（各10篇文章）。引文爆发分析显示，“与系统性红斑狼疮相关的肠道菌群失调”为该领域研究奠定了基础。关键词分析表明，研究从描述性微生物特征逐渐转向与免疫调节和菌群失调相关的主题。此外，针对SLE中基于微生物群的治疗方法的研究关注度日益增加。过去十年中，关于SLE肠道微生物群的研究大幅扩展，从关联性研究向更具机制性和转化性的研究主题转变。注意到不同区域的研究重点存在差异，这凸显了加强国际和跨学科合作在推动该领域研究中的潜在价值。引用本文：Yang J, Wang J. Research trends and emerging themes in gut microbiota-systemic lupus erythematosus research: A bibliometric analysis (2014-2025). ArchRheumatol. 2026;41(3):249-257.

items.title: Associations of Atherogenic Lipid Ratios and Visceral Adiposity Indices with Cardiovascular Risk Scores in Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is associated with increased cardiovascular risk beyond traditional risk factors. Recently, atherogenic lipid ratios and visceral adiposity indices have emerged as potential markers of cardiometabolic risk in chronic inflammatory diseases. This study aimed to examine their associations with estimated cardiovascular risk scores in patients with RA. This cross-sectional study included 198 patients with RA. Individuals with established cardiovascular disease or majör comorbid conditions were excluded. Atherogenic lipid ratios, including the Atherogenic Index of Plasma (AIP), Atherogenic Coefficient (AC), Castelli Risk Index (CRI)-1, CRI-2, and triglycerides (TG)/high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C) ratio, were calculated. Visceral adiposity indices included the Visceral Adiposity Index (VAI), Lipid Accumulation Product (LAP), and Waist-Triglyceride Index. Ten-year cardiovascular risk was estimated using the modified Framingham Risk Score (FRS) and the modified Systematic Coronary Risk Evaluation (SCORE) system. Atherogenic lipid ratios, particularly AC, CRI-1, and CRI-2, demonstrated weak but statistically significant positive correlations with both modified SCORE and modified FRS. In contrast, adiposity-related indices (LAP and VAI) and atherogenic lipid ratios (AIP and the TG/HDL-C ratio) were significantly associated with the modified FRS but not with the modified SCORE. No significant associations were observed between RA disease activity measures and cardiovascular risk scores. In RA, cardiovascular risk is linked closely to adiposity and lipid disturbances than current disease activity. Modified FRS may better capture adiposity-related cardiovascular risk than modified SCORE, and incorporation of atherogenic lipid and visceral adiposity indices may improve risk stratification. Cite this article as: Demir UG, Demir AN, Uysal A. Associations of atherogenic lipid ratios and visceral adiposity indices with cardiovascular risk scores in rheumatoid arthritis. ArchRheumatol. 2026;41(3):242-248.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎中致动脉粥样硬化脂质比值和内脏肥胖指数与心血管风险评分的关联
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）与超出传统危险因素的心血管风险增加相关。近年来，致动脉粥样硬化脂质比值和内脏肥胖指数已成为慢性炎症性疾病中心脏代谢风险的潜在标志物。本研究旨在探讨它们与RA患者估计心血管风险评分的关联。这项横断面研究纳入了198例RA患者。排除已确诊心血管疾病或主要合并症的个体。计算了致动脉粥样硬化脂质比值，包括血浆致动脉粥样硬化指数（AIP）、致动脉粥样硬化系数（AC）、Castelli风险指数（CRI）-1、CRI-2和甘油三酯（TG）/高密度脂蛋白胆固醇（HDL-C）比值。内脏肥胖指数包括内脏肥胖指数（VAI）、脂质蓄积产物（LAP）和腰围-甘油三酯指数。使用改良Framingham风险评分（FRS）和改良系统性冠状动脉风险评估（SCORE）系统估计十年心血管风险。致动脉粥样硬化脂质比值，特别是AC、CRI-1和CRI-2，与改良SCORE和改良FRS均呈弱但统计学显著的正相关。相比之下，肥胖相关指数（LAP和VAI）和致动脉粥样硬化脂质比值（AIP和TG/HDL-C比值）与改良FRS显著相关，但与改良SCORE无关。RA疾病活动度指标与心血管风险评分之间未观察到显著关联。在RA中，心血管风险与肥胖和脂质紊乱的关系比与当前疾病活动度的关系更密切。改良FRS可能比改良SCORE更好地捕捉肥胖相关的心血管风险，纳入致动脉粥样硬化脂质和内脏肥胖指数可能改善风险分层。引用本文：Demir UG, Demir AN, Uysal A. Associations of atherogenic lipid ratios and visceral adiposity indices with cardiovascular risk scores in rheumatoid arthritis. ArchRheumatol. 2026;41(3):242-248.

items.title: Vitamin D Receptor Polymorphisms and Rheumatoid Arthritis Risk: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis Evaluating the Moderating Effects of Ethnicity, Bone Erosion, and Classification Criteria.
items.abstract: Previous studies examining the association between vitamin D receptor (VDR) polymorphisms (ApaI, BsmI, TaqI, FokI) and rheumatoid arthritis (RA) have reported inconsistent findings. This metaanalysis aimed to evaluate whether clinical and population-level factors moderate this association. A systematic review of PubMed, Web of Science, Scopus, Cochrane Library, ClinicalTrials.gov, and Google Scholar was conducted up to July 19, 2024. Observational studies comparing VDR polymorphisms between RA patients and healthy controls were included. Studies without a control group, with fewer than 20 cases, or lacking relevant outcome data were excluded. Methodological quality was assessed using the Newcastle-Ottawa Scale. Random-effects meta-analyses, subgroup analyses, and meta-regression were performed. Twenty-five case-control studies (3711 RA patients and 3884 controls) were included. No significant overall association was observed between VDR polymorphisms and RA across genetic models. However, subgroup analyses demonstrated ethnic variability, with reduced RA likelihood observed among South Asians for the ApaI dominant model (OR = 0.26, 95% CI: 0.14-0.49) and BsmI polymorphism, while African populations showed increased likelihood for BsmI under the recessive model (OR = 1.77, 95% CI: 1.13-2.78). Meta-regression identified ethnicity, classification criteria, and bone erosion as significant moderators; bone erosion was associated with increased RA likelihood for the FokI dominant model (OR = 2.21, 95% CI: 1.24-3.97). Although no consistent overall association was identified, the relationship between VDR polymorphisms and RA appears to be modified by ethnicity, classification criteria, and disease severity. These findings underscore the importance of accounting for clinical and population heterogeneity in genetic association studies of RA. Cite this article as: Liu W, Xi S. Vitamin D receptor polymorphisms and rheumatoid arthritis risk: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluating the moderating effects of ethnicity, bone erosion, and classification criteria. Arch Rheumatol. 2026;41(3):168-187.

items.titleZh: 维生素D受体多态性与类风湿关节炎风险：一项评估种族、骨侵蚀和分类标准调节效应的系统评价与荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 既往关于维生素D受体（VDR）多态性（ApaI、BsmI、TaqI、FokI）与类风湿关节炎（RA）关联的研究结果不一致。本荟萃分析旨在评估临床和人群水平因素是否调节该关联。系统检索了PubMed、Web of Science、Scopus、Cochrane Library、ClinicalTrials.gov和Google Scholar，检索截止至2024年7月19日。纳入比较RA患者与健康对照者VDR多态性的观察性研究。排除无对照组、病例数少于20例或缺乏相关结局数据的研究。采用纽卡斯尔-渥太华量表评估方法学质量。进行了随机效应荟萃分析、亚组分析和荟萃回归。共纳入25项病例对照研究（3711例RA患者和3884例对照）。在遗传模型下，未观察到VDR多态性与RA之间存在显著总体关联。然而，亚组分析显示种族异质性：南亚人群中ApaI显性模型（OR = 0.26, 95% CI: 0.14-0.49）和BsmI多态性下RA可能性降低，而非洲人群中BsmI隐性模型下RA可能性增加（OR = 1.77, 95% CI: 1.13-2.78）。荟萃回归显示种族、分类标准和骨侵蚀是显著的调节因素；骨侵蚀与FokI显性模型下RA可能性增加相关（OR = 2.21, 95% CI: 1.24-3.97）。尽管未发现一致的总体关联，但VDR多态性与RA之间的关系似乎受种族、分类标准和疾病严重程度的影响。这些发现强调了在RA遗传关联研究中考虑临床和人群异质性的重要性。引用本文：Liu W, Xi S. Vitamin D receptor polymorphisms and rheumatoid arthritis risk: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluating the moderating effects of ethnicity, bone erosion, and classification criteria. Arch Rheumatol. 2026;41(3):168-187.

items.title: Reduced Serum Maresin-1 in Rheumatoid Arthritis and Fibromyalgia Compared With Healthy Controls: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.abstract: Maresin-1 (MaR-1), a specialized pro-resolving mediator, modulates inflammation and pain signaling. Serum MaR-1 was compared across rheumatoid arthritis (RA), fibromyalgia (FM), and healthy controls and examined its associations with disease activity and pain measures. In this cross-sectional study, patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) (n = 30), patients with fibromyalgia (FM) (n = 30), and healthy controls (n = 29) were enrolled. Clinical assessments included visual analog scale (VAS) scores for pain and fatigue, DAS28-CRP in the RA group, the PainDETECT questionnaire for neuropathic pain screening in RA patients, the Fibromyalgia Impact Questionnaire (FIQ) in the FM group, and the Beck Depression and Beck Anxiety Inventories (BDI and BAI) to assess emotional status. Serum MaR-1 was quantified by enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay. Group comparisons, correlations, and receiveroperating characteristic analyses were performed. Controls had higher MaR-1 than both patient groups (P < .001). In RA, MaR-1 inversely correlated with VAS pain, DAS28; in FM, MaR-1 inversely correlated with VAS pain (P < .001). Discriminative ability in this cohort (RA): Area under the curve (AUC) 0.941 (95% CI 0.887-0.996), cut-off ≤1.07, sensitivity 86.7%, and specificity 93.1%. Discriminative ability in this cohort (FM): AUC 0.933 (95% CI 0.861-1.000), cut-off ≤1.19, sensitivity 90.0%, specificity 93.1%. Serum MaR-1 is reduced in RA and FM and tracks with pain severity and disease activity, supporting its potential as a biomarker of chronic inflammatory pain biology. Larger longitudinal studies are warranted to establish clinical utility. Cite this article as: Tuncer T, Pıhtılı Taş N, Elbastı MŞ, Demirelli Ş. Reduced serum maresin-1 in rheumatoid arthritis and fibromyalgia compared with healthy controls: A cross-sectional study. Arch Rheumatol. 2026;41(3):233-241.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎和纤维肌痛患者血清Maresin-1水平较健康对照降低：一项横断面研究
items.abstractZh: Maresin-1 (MaR-1)是一种专门的前分解介质，调节炎症和疼痛信号。本研究比较了类风湿关节炎(RA)、纤维肌痛(FM)和健康对照组的血清MaR-1水平，并探讨了其与疾病活动度和疼痛指标的相关性。在这项横断面研究中，纳入了类风湿关节炎患者(n=30)、纤维肌痛患者(n=30)和健康对照者(n=29)。临床评估包括疼痛和疲劳的视觉模拟量表(VAS)评分、RA组的DAS28-CRP、RA患者神经病理性疼痛筛查的PainDETECT问卷、FM组的纤维肌痛影响问卷(FIQ)，以及评估情绪状态的贝克抑郁和贝克焦虑量表(BDI和BAI)。通过酶联免疫吸附试验定量血清MaR-1。进行了组间比较、相关性和受试者工作特征分析。对照组的MaR-1水平高于两个患者组(P < .001)。在RA中，MaR-1与VAS疼痛、DAS28呈负相关；在FM中，MaR-1与VAS疼痛呈负相关(P < .001)。在该队列(RA)中的区分能力：曲线下面积(AUC) 0.941 (95% CI 0.887-0.996)，截断值≤1.07，敏感性86.7%，特异性93.1%。在该队列(FM)中的区分能力：AUC 0.933 (95% CI 0.861-1.000)，截断值≤1.19，敏感性90.0%，特异性93.1%。血清MaR-1在RA和FM中降低，并与疼痛严重程度和疾病活动度相关，支持其作为慢性炎症性疼痛生物学标志物的潜力。需要更大规模的纵向研究来确定其临床实用性。引用本文：Tuncer T, Pıhtılı Taş N, Elbastı MŞ, Demirelli Ş. Reduced serum maresin-1 in rheumatoid arthritis and fibromyalgia compared with healthy controls: A cross-sectional study. Arch Rheumatol. 2026;41(3):233-241.

items.title: Comparison of Neck Muscle Thickness via Ultrasound in Patients with Ankylosing Spondylitis and Healthy Controls.
items.abstract: Neck pain and limited neck mobility are common symptoms in patients with ankylosing spondylitis (AS). This study aimed to quantify neck muscle thickness in individuals with AS using ultrasonography and to compare these findings with measurements obtained from healthy volunteers. A total of 30 individuals diagnosed with AS and 30 healthy participants were enrolled in this case-control study. The anteroposterior dimension, lateral dimension, cross-sectional area (CSA) of the longus colli (LC), cervical multifidus (CM), and anteroposterior dimension of the sternocleidomastoid were measured via ultrasound. Individuals diagnosed with AS were asked to complete the Neck Disability Index (NDI), the Ankylosing Spondylitis Quality of Life questionnaire (ASQoL), the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Activity Index (BASDAI), the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Functional Index (BASFI), and the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Metrology Index (BASMI). In the AS group, the anteroposterior thickness (P = .025) and CSA (P = .021) of the right LC were markedly reduced compared with the control group. Similarly, the left LC exhibited significantly smaller anteroposterior measurements (P = .023) and CSA values (P = .012) in patients with AS. Additionally, the lateral dimension of the CM was significantly decreased on both the right (P = .001) and left (P = .002) sides relative to healthy controls. In patients with AS, LC thickness correlated negatively with NDI, ASQoL, BASDAI, BASFI, and BASMI, and positively with cervical extension and lateral flexion. In multivariate regression analyses adjusted for age and body mass index, LC thickness was independently associated with disability, functional impairment, and spinal mobility limitation. Neck muscle thickness is reduced in AS patients, and atrophy of the LC shows significant correlations with greater disability, poorer quality of life, higher disease activity, impaired functional status, and limited spinal mobility. Cite this article as: Karacif D, Karacif O, Cagliyan Turk A. Comparison of neck muscle thickness via ultrasound in patients with ankylosing spondylitis and healthy controls. ArchRheumatol. 2026;41(3):212-222.

items.titleZh: 强直性脊柱炎患者与健康对照者颈部肌肉厚度的超声比较
items.abstractZh: 颈部疼痛和颈部活动受限是强直性脊柱炎（AS）患者的常见症状。本研究旨在通过超声检查量化AS患者的颈部肌肉厚度，并将这些结果与健康志愿者的测量值进行比较。本病例对照研究共纳入30名确诊AS患者和30名健康参与者。通过超声测量了头长肌（LC）、颈多裂肌（CM）的前后径、横径和横截面积（CSA），以及胸锁乳突肌的前后径。确诊AS的患者被要求完成颈部残疾指数（NDI）、强直性脊柱炎生活质量问卷（ASQoL）、巴斯强直性脊柱炎活动指数（BASDAI）、巴斯强直性脊柱炎功能指数（BASFI）和巴斯强直性脊柱炎测量指数（BASMI）。在AS组中，右侧LC的前后厚度（P = .025）和CSA（P = .021）较对照组显著减小。同样，AS患者左侧LC的前后测量值（P = .023）和CSA值（P = .012）也显著较小。此外，与健康对照组相比，CM的横径在右侧（P = .001）和左侧（P = .002）均显著减小。在AS患者中，LC厚度与NDI、ASQoL、BASDAI、BASFI和BASMI呈负相关，与颈椎后伸和侧屈呈正相关。在调整年龄和体重指数的多变量回归分析中，LC厚度与残疾、功能损害和脊柱活动受限独立相关。AS患者颈部肌肉厚度减少，LC萎缩与更大的残疾、更差的生活质量、更高的疾病活动度、受损的功能状态和有限的脊柱活动度显著相关。引用本文：Karacif D, Karacif O, Cagliyan Turk A. 强直性脊柱炎患者与健康对照者颈部肌肉厚度的超声比较. ArchRheumatol. 2026;41(3):212-222.

items.title: The Role and Mechanistic Effects of Methotrexate in the Treatment of Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: Methotrexate (MTX) remains a cornerstone in the management of rheumatoid arthritis (RA). Extensive basic pharmacological research has consistently demonstrated the e cacy of MTX in treating RA, while there is still insu cient understanding about the potential mechanisms. In this review, current knowledge on the mechanisms by which MTX acts in bone erosion and synovitis is summarized, and MTX-based combination therapies are discussed. Additionally, the bone-protective and anti-in%am matory roles of adenosine receptors are described, and biomarkers associated with MTX responders in RA are explored. This review sheds new light on future research directions for RA, as well as o ers evidence-based recommendations to enhance the clinical utilization of MTX in RA treatment.   Cite this article as: Teng Y, Jiang L, Yin H, Deng G. The role and mechanistic e ects of methotrexate in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis. Eur J Rheumatol. 2025:12(4), -0086, 10.5152/ eurjrheum.2025.24086.

items.title: Pubic symphysis osteomyelitis presenting as groin pain in a patient with rheumatoid arthritis: a case report.
items.abstract: Osteomyelitis of the pubic symphysis is a rare entity, affecting less than 1% of all osteomyelitis cases. It most frequently occurs in individuals with predisposing conditions, including states of immunosuppression, a history of pelvic or urogenital surgery, and intravenous drug use. In patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA), the diagnosis can be substantially delayed because clinical manifestations may mimic or overlap with those of inflammatory joint disease. We describe a case of presumed culture-negative osteomyelitis of the pubic symphysis in a patient with RA, emphasizing the diagnostic challenges and therapeutic considerations in this complex clinical setting. A woman in her late 60s with long-standing seropositive RA, managed with methotrexate and prednisolone, and with comorbid type 2 diabetes mellitus, hypertension, and osteoporosis, presented with a two‑month history of progressively worsening right groin pain refractory to analgesic therapy, leading to significant functional limitation and gait impairment. On admission, she was afebrile with hemodynamically stable vital signs. Physical examination revealed suprapubic tenderness and a reduced range of motion of the right hip. Laboratory investigations showed leukocytosis (14.2 × 10⁹/L, 91% neutrophils), markedly elevated C‑reactive protein (149 mg/L), and an increased erythrocyte sedimentation rate (133 mm/h). Blood cultures remained sterile, whereas urine culture grew methicillin‑sensitive Staphylococcus aureus (MSSA). Serological testing for brucellosis and a tuberculin skin test were both negative. Contrast‑enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the pelvis demonstrated an abscess involving the pubic symphysis associated with reactive osteitis. Culture of aspirated abscess material was sterile, and histopathological examination of the biopsy specimen showed nonspecific inflammatory changes without granulomatous inflammation. Empirical antimicrobial therapy with intravenous cefazolin and ciprofloxacin was administered for 30 days, followed by oral ciprofloxacin and doxycycline for an additional two months. The patient achieved complete clinical and laboratory resolution without the need for surgical intervention. Follow‑up CT imaging confirmed resolution of the abscess, with residual diastasis of the pubic symphysis. Pubic symphysis osteomyelitis should be included in the differential diagnosis of atypical pelvic pain in immunosuppressed patients with RA. Ongoing immunosuppressive therapy may obscure or attenuate systemic manifestations of infection, thereby contributing to delayed diagnosis. Early utilization of cross-sectional imaging modalities and the administration of prolonged, targeted antimicrobial therapy are critical to achieving favourable clinical outcomes.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者表现为腹股沟疼痛的耻骨联合骨髓炎：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 耻骨联合骨髓炎是一种罕见疾病，占所有骨髓炎病例的比例不到1%。它最常发生于具有易感因素的个体，包括免疫抑制状态、盆腔或泌尿生殖系统手术史以及静脉注射药物使用。在类风湿关节炎（RA）患者中，由于临床表现可能与炎性关节病相似或重叠，诊断可能被显著延迟。我们描述了一例RA患者中推测为培养阴性的耻骨联合骨髓炎，强调了这一复杂临床情况下的诊断挑战和治疗考虑。一名60多岁女性，患有长期血清阳性RA，使用甲氨蝶呤和泼尼松龙治疗，并伴有2型糖尿病、高血压和骨质疏松症，表现为进行性加重的右腹股沟疼痛两个月，对镇痛治疗无效，导致显著的功能受限和步态障碍。入院时，她无发热，生命体征血流动力学稳定。体格检查显示耻骨上压痛和右髋关节活动范围减少。实验室检查显示白细胞增多（14.2 × 10⁹/L，91%中性粒细胞）、C反应蛋白显著升高（149 mg/L）和红细胞沉降率增加（133 mm/h）。血培养保持无菌，而尿培养生长出甲氧西林敏感金黄色葡萄球菌（MSSA）。布鲁氏菌病血清学检测和结核菌素皮肤试验均为阴性。盆腔增强计算机断层扫描（CT）显示耻骨联合脓肿伴反应性骨炎。抽吸的脓肿物质培养无菌，活检标本的组织病理学检查显示非特异性炎症改变，无肉芽肿性炎症。给予静脉头孢唑林和环丙沙星经验性抗菌治疗30天，随后口服环丙沙星和多西环素两个月。患者达到完全临床和实验室缓解，无需手术干预。随访CT影像证实脓肿消退，耻骨联合残留分离。在免疫抑制的RA患者中，耻骨联合骨髓炎应纳入非典型盆腔疼痛的鉴别诊断。持续的免疫抑制治疗可能掩盖或减弱感染的全身表现，从而导致诊断延迟。早期使用横断面影像学检查并给予长期、靶向抗菌治疗对于获得良好临床结局至关重要。

items.title: Bridging the implementation gap: a qualitative study of barriers to integrating psychological care into rheumatoid arthritis services in Iran.
items.abstract: Despite robust evidence and explicit guideline recommendations, psychological care is rarely integrated into routine Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA) services in Iran. This study explored the multilevel barriers to this implementation gap. A qualitative study guided by the Consolidated Framework for Implementation Research (CFIR) was conducted. Semi-structured interviews were held with 34 stakeholders (12 patients, 8 rheumatologists, 7 nurses, 4 psychologists, 3 hospital managers) in Iranian rheumatology clinics. Data were analyzed using directed content analysis. Barriers interacted across CFIR domains, forming an interpretive model of a reinforcing cycle. Financial exclusion (Outer Setting) reinforced biomedical clinic culture (Inner Setting), which diminished professional self-efficacy (Characteristics of Individuals) and nullified implementation processes. Stigma and lack of structured pathways were key themes. The integration gap reflects systemic misalignment, not a lack of evidence. Closing it requires coordinated policy, organizational, and educational reforms, not isolated interventions.

items.titleZh: 弥合实施差距：伊朗类风湿关节炎服务中整合心理护理障碍的定性研究
items.abstractZh: 尽管有强有力的证据和明确的指南建议，心理护理在伊朗很少被整合到常规类风湿关节炎（RA）服务中。本研究探讨了导致这一实施差距的多层次障碍。一项以实施研究综合框架（CFIR）为指导的定性研究得以开展。在伊朗风湿病诊所对34名利益相关者（12名患者、8名风湿病医生、7名护士、4名心理学家、3名医院管理者）进行了半结构化访谈。采用定向内容分析法分析数据。障碍在CFIR各领域间相互作用，形成了一个强化循环的解释模型。经济排斥（外部环境）强化了生物医学诊所文化（内部环境），这削弱了专业自我效能（个体特征）并抵消了实施过程。污名化和缺乏结构化路径是关键主题。整合差距反映了系统性失调，而非缺乏证据。弥合这一差距需要协调的政策、组织和教育改革，而非孤立的干预措施。

items.title: Refining serological scores in rheumatoid arthritis classification: an international study.
items.abstract: In the American College of Rheumatology/European Alliance of Rheumatology Associations 2010 classification criteria for rheumatoid arthritis (RA), rheumatoid factor (RF) and anti-citrullinated protein/peptide antibodies (ACPA) are assigned the same weight, although ACPA have proven more specific than RF. We aimed to refine the serological weight factors for RA classification. Diagnostic samples from 398 patients with RA and 448 diseased controls (DC) were evaluated with RF and ACPA assays from five different manufacturers. A grid search was conducted across all possible integer score pairs for RF and ACPA to identify the weighting combination that optimised the specificity of RA classification. This combination was applied in a refined scoring system (RSS) for three confirmatory cohorts comprising, respectively, 67, 157 and 132 patients with RA and 441, 153 and 193 DC. In the investigative cohort, the optimal combination of weighting scores was characterised by higher scores for ACPA, higher antibody levels and double RF/ACPA positivity.Applying the optimal combination of weighting scores decreased misclassification compared with the 2010 RA classification criteria, minimally affecting sensitivity. For seropositive patients, RSS significantly lowered misclassification from 38.3-55.8% to 15.0-26.9%.The improved specificity of RSS (compared with the 2010 criteria) was validated in the confirmatory cohorts. Considering only seropositive patients, the RSS significantly decreased RA misclassification (8.6-36.8% vs 20.0-78.9%), minimally affecting the sensitivity (86.7-97.3% vs 86.7-96.0%). Serological weight factors for RA classification can be improved by taking into account the antibody type, the antibody levels and single or combined positivity. The application of an RSS reduced the number of RA misclassifications.

items.titleZh: 优化类风湿关节炎分类中的血清学评分：一项国际研究
items.abstractZh: 在2010年美国风湿病学会/欧洲风湿病联盟的类风湿关节炎（RA）分类标准中，类风湿因子（RF）和抗瓜氨酸蛋白/肽抗体（ACPA）被赋予相同的权重，尽管ACPA已被证明比RF更具特异性。我们旨在优化RA分类的血清学权重因子。使用来自五个不同制造商的RF和ACPA检测方法，评估了398例RA患者和448例疾病对照（DC）的诊断样本。对所有可能的RF和ACPA整数评分对进行网格搜索，以确定优化RA分类特异性的权重组合。将该组合应用于三个验证队列的优化评分系统（RSS），这些队列分别包括67、157和132例RA患者以及441、153和193例DC。在调查队列中，权重评分的最优组合以ACPA评分更高、抗体水平更高以及RF/ACPA双阳性为特征。与2010年RA分类标准相比，应用最优权重评分组合减少了错误分类，对敏感性影响极小。对于血清阳性患者，RSS将错误分类率从38.3-55.8%显著降低至15.0-26.9%。RSS（与2010年标准相比）改善的特异性在验证队列中得到确认。仅考虑血清阳性患者时，RSS显著降低了RA错误分类（8.6-36.8% vs 20.0-78.9%），对敏感性影响极小（86.7-97.3% vs 86.7-96.0%）。通过考虑抗体类型、抗体水平以及单阳性或双阳性，可以改进RA分类的血清学权重因子。应用RSS减少了RA错误分类的数量。

items.title: Medication adherence in Behçet's syndrome: real-world data from a tertiary referral cohort.
items.abstract: Medication adherence is a key determinant of treatment effectiveness in chronic inflammatory diseases but data in Behçet's syndrome (BS) remain limited. This study evaluated medication adherence in a real-world cohort of patients with BS and explored demographic and clinical factors associated with reduced adherence. We conducted a monocentric cross-sectional study including 125 patients with BS followed at a tertiary referral centre. Adherence was assessed using the validated 8-item Morisky Medication Adherence Scale (MMAS-8). Patients were classified as having high (score=8), intermediate (score 6-<8) or low adherence (score<6). Disease activity was evaluated using the Behçet's Disease Current Activity Form and the Behçet's Disease Activity Index. Associations between adherence and clinical variables were analysed using Spearman correlation and non-parametric tests. The mean MMAS-8 Score was 6.82±1.32. High adherence was observed in 29.6% of patients, intermediate adherence in 48.8% and low adherence in 21.6%. Lower adherence was more frequent among patients in the lower age quartiles. No significant associations were observed between adherence and sex, disease duration, disease activity indices or treatment class. Medication adherence in BS appeared generally satisfactory, although a relevant proportion of patients reported suboptimal adherence. These findings confirm, in a BS-specific real-world setting, previously reported associations between age and medication adherence observed in chronic diseases. Routine adherence assessment may help identify patients at higher risk of poor treatment compliance and support personalised management strategies.

items.title: Prevalence and clinical associations of cerebral atrophy in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: To determine the prevalence of cerebral atrophy in a multi-ethnic systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) cohort and to identify its associated clinical factors. In this cross-sectional study (2024-2025), adults fulfilling the 2019 European League Against Rheumatism/American College of Rheumatology (EULAR/ACR) classification criteria for SLE at University Malaya Medical Centre were recruited. Demographic, clinical, serological, vascular and treatment data were collected. Disease activity and cumulative damage were assessed using the SLE Disease Activity Index 2000 (SLEDAI-2K) and the Systemic Lupus International Collaborating Clinics/American College of Rheumatology Damage Index (SDI). Non-contrast CT brain scans were performed with cerebral atrophy graded using the validated Global Cortical Atrophy (GCA) score. Cognitive function was evaluated using the Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA). Fisher's exact test and χ 2 test were used to test the association between two categorical variables where appropriate, while group differences were tested using the Mann-Whitney U test. Univariable and multivariable logistic regression analyses were considered to identify variables that were significantly associated with cerebral atrophy. Seventy patients (92.9% female; median age 40 (IQR 31.75-50.25) years; median disease duration 12 (IQR 4-19) years were included. Cerebral atrophy was present in 52.9%, predominantly mild (75.7%). From univariate comparisons, patients with cerebral atrophy were significantly older in age, had longer disease duration, lower education, higher SDI and poorer MoCA scores. Multivariable analysis showed that older age (OR 1.10 per year, 95% CI 1.04 to 1.18) and neuropsychiatric SLE (NPSLE) (OR 4.58, 95% CI 1.05 to 24.07) contributed to increased odds of cerebral atrophy, while higher educational attainment was linked with reduced odds of cerebral atrophy (OR 0.22, 95% CI 0.06 to 1.03). Cerebral atrophy is common in SLE and independently associated with age, education, NPSLE and cognitive impairment, reflecting neuroinflammatory and neurodegenerative mechanisms. These findings underscore the importance of cognitive screening and targeted monitoring of high-risk patients.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中脑萎缩的患病率及临床关联
items.abstractZh: 目的：确定多民族系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）队列中脑萎缩的患病率，并识别其相关临床因素。在这项横断面研究（2024-2025年）中，招募了马来亚大学医学中心符合2019年欧洲抗风湿病联盟/美国风湿病学会（EULAR/ACR）SLE分类标准的成人患者。收集了人口统计学、临床、血清学、血管和治疗数据。使用SLE疾病活动指数2000（SLEDAI-2K）和系统性狼疮国际合作诊所/美国风湿病学会损伤指数（SDI）评估疾病活动性和累积损伤。进行了非增强CT脑扫描，并使用经过验证的全局皮质萎缩（GCA）评分对脑萎缩进行分级。使用蒙特利尔认知评估（MoCA）评估认知功能。采用Fisher精确检验和χ²检验检验两个分类变量之间的关联，而组间差异使用Mann-Whitney U检验。考虑单变量和多变量逻辑回归分析以识别与脑萎缩显著相关的变量。共纳入70名患者（92.9%为女性；中位年龄40岁（IQR 31.75-50.25）岁；中位病程12年（IQR 4-19）年）。脑萎缩存在于52.9%的患者中，主要为轻度（75.7%）。从单变量比较来看，脑萎缩患者年龄显著较大、病程较长、教育程度较低、SDI较高且MoCA评分较差。多变量分析显示，年龄较大（OR 1.10/年，95% CI 1.04至1.18）和神经精神性SLE（NPSLE）（OR 4.58，95% CI 1.05至24.07）增加了脑萎缩的几率，而较高的教育程度与脑萎缩几率降低相关（OR 0.22，95% CI 0.06至1.03）。脑萎缩在SLE中常见，并与年龄、教育程度、NPSLE和认知障碍独立相关，反映了神经炎症和神经退行性机制。这些发现强调了认知筛查和高风险患者针对性监测的重要性。

items.title: Impact of belimumab on the utility of serological markers for assessing systemic lupus erythematosus activity.
items.abstract: To evaluate the dynamics of C3, C4 and anti-dsDNA antibody levels and their association with clinical activity and flares in patients with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) treated with belimumab (BEL). Retrospective longitudinal cohort study from the BELILES-GEAS registry. Serological markers were assessed at the time of SLE diagnosis, at baseline, at each follow-up visit (months 3, 6, 12, 18, and 24 after treatment initiation) and during disease flares. A total of 371 patients were included, with a median drug exposure of 13.2 months. At baseline, 70.1% of patients were seropositive. SLE Disease Activity Index 2000 (SLEDAI-2K) and cSLEDAI scores and prednisone doses decreased significantly over time, whereas serum C3 and C4 levels, anti-dsDNA positivity and immunosuppressant use remained stable. Among 95 (25.6%) patients who experienced 139 (14.5%) flares, longitudinal analysis adjusted by immunosuppressant use and prednisone dose revealed no association between flare occurrence and low C3 or C4, whereas anti-dsDNA antibody positivity was (C3 OR=1.31, 95% CI 0.82 to 2.09; C4 OR=1.08, 95% CI 0.62 to 1.86, and anti-dsDNA OR=1.81, 95% CI 1.09 to 3.01, respectively). When stratified by flare severity, low C3 levels showed a borderline association with moderate-to-severe flares (OR=1.82, 95% CI 0.99 to 3.31), while no significant associations were observed for C4 or for mild flares. There was no association between serum level of C3 or C4 and cSLEDAI. The flare-discriminative performance of SLEDAI-2K and cSLEDAI was similar (AUC-ROCs 0.779 vs 0.781, p=0.88). In SLE patients treated with BEL, the clinical utility of serological markers appears dissociated from disease activity. While C3 and C4 levels were not clearly related to disease activity or flares, low C3 levels showed a borderline association with moderate-to-severe flares, and anti-dsDNA positivity remained associated with increased flare risk, supporting a clinical assessment-driven approach with complementary use of anti-dsDNA.

items.titleZh: 贝利木单抗对血清学标志物评估系统性红斑狼疮活动性的影响
items.abstractZh: 评估接受贝利木单抗（BEL）治疗的系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者中C3、C4和抗dsDNA抗体水平的动态变化及其与临床活动性和疾病发作的关系。来自BELILES-GEAS登记处的回顾性纵向队列研究。在SLE诊断时、基线时、每次随访访视（治疗开始后第3、6、12、18和24个月）以及疾病发作期间评估血清学标志物。共纳入371例患者，中位药物暴露时间为13.2个月。基线时，70.1%的患者血清学阳性。SLE疾病活动指数2000（SLEDAI-2K）和cSLEDAI评分以及泼尼松剂量随时间显著下降，而血清C3和C4水平、抗dsDNA阳性率和免疫抑制剂使用保持稳定。在95例（25.6%）经历139次（14.5%）发作的患者中，经免疫抑制剂使用和泼尼松剂量调整的纵向分析显示，发作与低C3或C4之间无关联，而与抗dsDNA抗体阳性存在关联（C3 OR=1.31，95% CI 0.82至2.09；C4 OR=1.08，95% CI 0.62至1.86；抗dsDNA OR=1.81，95% CI 1.09至3.01）。按发作严重程度分层时，低C3水平与中重度发作呈边缘性关联（OR=1.82，95% CI 0.99至3.31），而C4或轻度发作未见显著关联。血清C3或C4水平与cSLEDAI之间无关联。SLEDAI-2K和cSLEDAI的发作区分性能相似（AUC-ROC分别为0.779和0.781，p=0.88）。在接受BEL治疗的SLE患者中，血清学标志物的临床效用似乎与疾病活动性分离。虽然C3和C4水平与疾病活动性或发作无明显相关，但低C3水平与中重度发作呈边缘性关联，且抗dsDNA阳性仍与发作风险增加相关，支持以临床评估为导向并辅以抗dsDNA检测的方法。

items.title: Adult-onset Still's disease presenting with periorbital erythematous rash and progressive interstitial lung disease.
items.abstract: A man in his 80s with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease presented with fever, arthralgia and periorbital erythema resembling a heliotrope rash, accompanied by progressive interstitial lung disease (ILD). Laboratory investigations revealed neutrophilic leucocytosis and markedly elevated C-reactive protein, ferritin and Krebs von den Lungen-6. Dermatomyositis, particularly clinically amyopathic dermatomyositis, was considered in the differential diagnosis; however, myositis-specific autoantibodies were negative and histopathological findings supported a diagnosis of adult-onset Still's disease (AOSD). Despite the high-dose corticosteroids and ciclosporin, lung disease progressed to respiratory failure. Treatment with tocilizumab led to clinical and radiological remission with normalisation of inflammatory markers.This case highlights that AOSD can present with rapidly progressive ILD and closely mimic dermatomyositis, underscoring the importance of careful differential diagnosis and timely cytokine-targeted therapy.

items.titleZh: 以眶周红斑皮疹和进行性间质性肺病为表现的成人斯蒂尔病
items.abstractZh: 一名80多岁患有慢性阻塞性肺疾病的男性出现发热、关节痛和类似向阳性皮疹的眶周红斑，伴有进行性间质性肺病（ILD）。实验室检查显示中性粒细胞性白细胞增多，C反应蛋白、铁蛋白和Krebs von den Lungen-6显著升高。鉴别诊断中考虑了皮肌炎，特别是临床无肌病性皮肌炎；然而，肌炎特异性自身抗体阴性，组织病理学结果支持成人斯蒂尔病（AOSD）的诊断。尽管使用了大剂量皮质类固醇和环孢素，肺部疾病仍进展为呼吸衰竭。托珠单抗治疗后，临床和影像学缓解，炎症标志物恢复正常。本病例强调，AOSD可表现为快速进展的ILD并密切模仿皮肌炎，凸显了仔细鉴别诊断和及时细胞因子靶向治疗的重要性。

items.title: Cardiovascular risk assessment using the DAS28-GGT score in rheumatoid arthritis patients initiating JAK inhibitors: results from the MAJIK-SFR registry.
items.abstract: Cardiovascular disease is the leading cause of death in rheumatoid arthritis (RA). By replacing C-reactive protein (CRP) with gamma-glutamyl transferase (GGT), the DAS28-GGT was developed to integrate both inflammatory disease activity and cardiovascular (CV) risk into a single score. We evaluated its ability to classify CV risk in RA patients initiating Janus kinase inhibitors (JAKi) and compared its performance with DAS28-CRP. This cross-sectional study used data from the MAJIK-SFR observational registry. RA patients initiating a JAKi with available GGT were included. CV risk was estimated using the SCORE2 and Framingham equations. The discriminative performance of the DAS28-GGT was assessed using ROC curves and compared with the DeLong test. DAS28-GGT discrimination across DAS28-CRP disease activity categories was assessed. We included 185 RA patients (72% women, mean age 58 ± 13 years). Mean DAS28-CRP was 4.07 ± 1.27 and mean DAS28-GGT 8.88 ± 1.83. According to SCORE2, 54.3% patients were at low, 38.9% at moderate, and 6.8% at high CV risk and 34.8%, 44.7%, and 20.5%, according to Framingham, respectively. DAS28-GGT better discriminated patients with at least moderate CV risk than DAS28-CRP (SCORE2 AUC 0.59 vs 0.52, p <0.05; Framingham AUC 0.63 vs 0.53, p <0.01). DAS28-GGT significantly discriminated DAS28-CRP remission, low, and high disease activity (AUCs 0.91, 0.70, and 0.83 respectively). This study supports the DAS28-GGT as a simple and practical tool to capture both cardiovascular risk and inflammatory activity in RA patients initiating JAKi. Prospective studies are needed to confirm its value for predicting cardiovascular events.

items.titleZh: 使用DAS28-GGT评分评估启动JAK抑制剂的类风湿关节炎患者的心血管风险：来自MAJIK-SFR登记研究的结果。
items.abstractZh: 心血管疾病是类风湿关节炎（RA）患者死亡的主要原因。通过用γ-谷氨酰转移酶（GGT）替代C反应蛋白（CRP），开发了DAS28-GGT，以将炎症疾病活动度和心血管（CV）风险整合到一个评分中。我们评估了其在启动Janus激酶抑制剂（JAKi）的RA患者中对CV风险进行分类的能力，并将其性能与DAS28-CRP进行了比较。这项横断面研究使用了来自MAJIK-SFR观察性登记的数据。纳入了启动JAKi且有可用GGT的RA患者。使用SCORE2和Framingham方程估计CV风险。使用ROC曲线评估DAS28-GGT的区分性能，并通过DeLong检验进行比较。评估了DAS28-GGT在DAS28-CRP疾病活动度类别中的区分能力。我们纳入了185名RA患者（72%为女性，平均年龄58±13岁）。平均DAS28-CRP为4.07±1.27，平均DAS28-GGT为8.88±1.83。根据SCORE2，54.3%的患者处于低CV风险，38.9%处于中度，6.8%处于高CV风险；根据Framingham，分别为34.8%、44.7%和20.5%。DAS28-GGT比DAS28-CRP更好地区分了至少中度CV风险的患者（SCORE2 AUC 0.59 vs 0.52，p <0.05；Framingham AUC 0.63 vs 0.53，p <0.01）。DAS28-GGT显著区分了DAS28-CRP缓解、低和高疾病活动度（AUC分别为0.91、0.70和0.83）。本研究支持DAS28-GGT作为一种简单实用的工具，用于捕捉启动JAKi的RA患者的心血管风险和炎症活动度。需要前瞻性研究来确认其在预测心血管事件方面的价值。

items.title: Investigating the Impact of Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis on Health, Costs, and Quality of Life in Australia: The IMPACT Study.
items.abstract: To evaluate the impact of juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA) on the lives of children and young adults in Australia, including healthcare interactions, treatment, physical and mental health, social/familial impact, costs and quality of life, and to determine priorities for research. Cross-sectional online survey conducted from February through June 2023 across Australia of individuals 0-25 years diagnosed with JIA or their parents/caregivers. Analyses included descriptive statistics: percentages and counts for discrete variables and mean and standard deviation for quantitative variables. Full text responses were coded into themes to quantify responses. Of 184 participants, mean age was 12 years; 67% were female. Participants averaged 25 visits annually to 5.6 health professionals. Blood tests and eye examinations averaged 4 and 3 per year, respectively. Over half (56%) had a hospitalization in the past year, of which 80% were day-stays. Medication use was high (97%), mostly csDMARDS (73.4%), NSAIDs (73.4%) and bDMARDS (53.3%) with adverse effects affecting 72%. The greatest health impact was on mental health (53%); half experienced moderate-severe pain and 30% required aids for daily living. Children missed 1 month of school/year. The greatest social impact on participants was sport (77%) and on families emotional health (59%). Mean annual government costs were 19,795 USD/participant. Quality of life measures were low with mean PedsQL score 54.5 and mean CHU9D score 0.53. Priority research areas included long-term health impact, medication use, and physical impact. The broad burden of JIA highlights the need for models of holistic management that extend beyond clinical considerations to encompass and address the lived experience and needs of individuals and families affected by JIA.

items.titleZh: 调查青少年特发性关节炎对澳大利亚健康、成本和生活质量的影响：IMPACT研究。
items.abstractZh: 评估青少年特发性关节炎（JIA）对澳大利亚儿童和年轻人生活的影响，包括医疗互动、治疗、身心健康、社会/家庭影响、成本和生活质量，并确定研究优先事项。2023年2月至6月在澳大利亚进行横断面在线调查，对象为0-25岁确诊JIA的个体或其父母/照顾者。分析包括描述性统计：离散变量的百分比和计数，定量变量的均值和标准差。全文回答被编码为主题以量化回答。在184名参与者中，平均年龄为12岁；67%为女性。参与者平均每年就诊25次，涉及5.6名健康专业人员。血液检查和眼科检查平均每年分别为4次和3次。超过一半（56%）在过去一年内住院，其中80%为日间住院。药物使用率高（97%），主要为csDMARDS（73.4%）、NSAIDs（73.4%）和bDMARDS（53.3%），72%出现不良反应。最大的健康影响是心理健康（53%）；一半经历中度至重度疼痛，30%需要日常生活辅助。儿童每年缺课1个月。对参与者最大的社会影响是运动（77%），对家庭最大的影响是情绪健康（59%）。平均年度政府成本为19,795 USD/参与者。生活质量测量值低，平均PedsQL评分为54.5，平均CHU9D评分为0.53。优先研究领域包括长期健康影响、药物使用和身体影响。JIA的广泛负担凸显了需要超越临床考虑的整体管理模型，以涵盖并解决受JIA影响的个体和家庭的生活体验和需求。
