items.title: Distinct cytokine and chemokine alterations in bronchoalveolar fluid from patients with systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis associated lung disease (SJIA-LD).
items.abstract: Lung disease associated with systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis (SJIA-LD) remains poorly understood. Evaluation of bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) may better reflect disease pathogenesis. The objectives of our study were to measure levels of cytokines and chemokines in BALF and their associations with clinical features and treatment in patients with SJIA-LD. Children with SJIA-LD undergoing clinically indicated diagnostic bronchoscopy were enrolled. Comparator BALF was collected from patients with other chronic inflammatory and non-inflammatory lung diseases. BALF was assayed for IL-6, 8 and 18, S100A8/9, S100A12, sCD25, CCL11, CCL17, CCL25, MMP7, and CXCL9. BALF was obtained from 21 patients with SJIA-LD and 54 comparator patients with other lung diseases. Compared to all controls, children with SJIA-LD had a significant elevation of IL-18 (median (IQR) 1406 (722.3-2812) vs 37.2 (25.3-70) pg/mL, p < 0.0001), S100A8/9 (4745.3 (3003-11506) vs. 1297.5 (260-7755) ng/mL, p = 0.02), sCD25 (31.6 (19-50.3) vs. 13.6 (8.6-37.3) pg/mL, p = 0.04), MMP-7 (18,466.7 (10,462.2-33,516.1) vs. 13.645 (8.6-37.3) pg/mL, p = 0.0384), and CCL17 (0 (0-63.1; p = 0.038) vs 0 (0-0) pg/mL. BALF IL-18 was significantly higher in children with SJIA-LD compared to all control subgroups (inflammatory and non-inflammatory airway disease, autoimmune pulmonary alveolar proteinosis, and poorly controlled asthma), in patients who were actively treated with anti-cytokine biologics (N = 9), and in patients who ultimately underwent hematopoietic stem cell transfer (N = 8). Patients receiving anti-cytokine biologics also had significant elevations in several other cytokines compared to patients without such treatments, while profiles in those treated with JAKi (N = 14) were largely similar. Linear regression analysis showed an association between BALF level of IL-18 and the number of immunosuppressive medications utilized (p = 0.0167), but not with O2 requirement, dose of anakinra or prednisone, plasma IL-18, ferritin, CRP or ESR. Patients with SJIA-LD showed a distinct BALF cytokine profile, including significant IL-18, S100A8/9 protein, sCD25, and CCL-17 elevation. The level of IL-18 was higher in patients who required more immunosuppressive medications and were actively treated with anti-cytokine biologics. The relationship between BALF cytokine profiles and anti-cytokine biologics and JAK inhibitors is unclear and should be evaluated further.

items.titleZh: 系统性幼年特发性关节炎相关肺病患者支气管肺泡液中独特的细胞因子和趋化因子改变
items.abstractZh: 与系统性幼年特发性关节炎相关的肺病（SJIA-LD）仍知之甚少。评估支气管肺泡灌洗液（BALF）可能更好地反映疾病发病机制。我们研究的目的是测量SJIA-LD患者BALF中细胞因子和趋化因子的水平及其与临床特征和治疗的关系。纳入因临床指征接受诊断性支气管镜检查的SJIA-LD患儿。从其他慢性炎症性和非炎症性肺病患者收集对照BALF。检测BALF中IL-6、IL-8、IL-18、S100A8/9、S100A12、sCD25、CCL11、CCL17、CCL25、MMP7和CXCL9。从21例SJIA-LD患者和54例其他肺病对照患者获取BALF。与所有对照组相比，SJIA-LD患儿的IL-18（中位数（IQR）1406（722.3-2812） vs 37.2（25.3-70）pg/mL，p < 0.0001）、S100A8/9（4745.3（3003-11506） vs 1297.5（260-7755）ng/mL，p = 0.02）、sCD25（31.6（19-50.3） vs 13.6（8.6-37.3）pg/mL，p = 0.04）、MMP-7（18466.7（10462.2-33516.1） vs 13.645（8.6-37.3）pg/mL，p = 0.0384）和CCL17（0（0-63.1；p = 0.038） vs 0（0-0）pg/mL）显著升高。与所有对照亚组（炎症性和非炎症性气道疾病、自身免疫性肺泡蛋白沉积症和难治性哮喘）相比，SJIA-LD患儿的BALF IL-18显著升高，在积极接受抗细胞因子生物制剂治疗的患者（N = 9）和最终接受造血干细胞移植的患者（N = 8）中也是如此。接受抗细胞因子生物制剂的患者与其他未接受此类治疗的患者相比，多种其他细胞因子也显著升高，而接受JAKi治疗的患者（N = 14）的细胞因子谱大致相似。线性回归分析显示BALF中IL-18水平与使用的免疫抑制药物数量相关（p = 0.0167），但与氧气需求、阿那白滞素或泼尼松剂量、血浆IL-18、铁蛋白、CRP或ESR无关。SJIA-LD患者表现出独特的BALF细胞因子谱，包括IL-18、S100A8/9蛋白、sCD25和CCL-17显著升高。需要更多免疫抑制药物并积极接受抗细胞因子生物制剂治疗的患者IL-18水平更高。BALF细胞因子谱与抗细胞因子生物制剂和JAK抑制剂之间的关系尚不清楚，应进一步评估。

items.title: Clinicopathological Correlations, Treatment Response, and Predictors of Outcomes in Childhood Lupus Nephritis in China.
items.abstract: To investigate clinicopathological correlations, treatment responses, and predictors of outcomes in childhood lupus nephritis (cLN). Retrospective cohort study of 71 biopsy-proven cLN patients at Beijing Children's Hospital (2005-2024). Renal biopsies were classified per 2018 ISN/RPS criteria with activity index (AI) and chronicity index (CI) assessment. Over a median 40-month follow-up, 69.1% were female (mean onset age 10.0 ± 2.3 years). Proliferative LN (Class III/IV ± V) accounted for 76.0%. AI correlated with acute injury markers (creatinine, BUN, proteinuria); CI showed stronger associations with chronic tubular biomarkers but not eGFR. Complete renal remission (CRR) was achieved in 92.8% (mean 13.4 months); 26.6% experienced relapse. Failure to achieve CRR was associated with higher AI (OR = 1.738, p = 0.045), elevated SLEDAI-2K (OR = 1.339, p = 0.023), and lower C3 (OR = 0.002, p = 0.035). Higher CI predicted lower likelihood of achieving LLDAS (OR = 1.425, p = 0.042). Belimumab reduced relapse risk (OR = 0.220, p = 0.043), decreased glucocorticoid doses (8.42 vs. 16.54 mg/day, p = 0.034), and improved LLDAS (68.4% vs. 30.0%, p = 0.006) and clinical remission rates (52.6% vs. 20.0%, p = 0.016). CKD developed in 4.3%; mortality was 1.4%. Modern treatment yields favorable outcomes for cLN. Baseline disease activity, hypocomplementemia, and histological AI predict treatment response. AI and CI demonstrate distinct associations with acute and chronic injury. Belimumab offers significant advantages in relapse prevention and glucocorticoid reduction.

items.titleZh: 中国儿童狼疮性肾炎的临床病理相关性、治疗反应及结局预测因素
items.abstractZh: 探讨儿童狼疮性肾炎（cLN）的临床病理相关性、治疗反应及结局预测因素。回顾性队列研究，纳入北京儿童医院2005-2024年经活检证实的71例cLN患者。肾活检按2018年ISN/RPS标准分类，并评估活动指数（AI）和慢性指数（CI）。中位随访40个月，女性占69.1%（平均发病年龄10.0±2.3岁）。增殖性LN（III/IV±V类）占76.0%。AI与急性损伤标志物（肌酐、BUN、蛋白尿）相关；CI与慢性肾小管生物标志物相关性更强，但与eGFR无关。完全肾脏缓解（CRR）率达92.8%（平均13.4个月）；26.6%出现复发。未能达到CRR与较高AI（OR=1.738，p=0.045）、升高SLEDAI-2K（OR=1.339，p=0.023）及较低C3（OR=0.002，p=0.035）相关。较高CI预测达到LLDAS的可能性较低（OR=1.425，p=0.042）。贝利木单抗降低复发风险（OR=0.220，p=0.043），减少糖皮质激素剂量（8.42 vs. 16.54 mg/天，p=0.034），并改善LLDAS（68.4% vs. 30.0%，p=0.006）和临床缓解率（52.6% vs. 20.0%，p=0.016）。CKD发生率为4.3%；死亡率为1.4%。现代治疗为cLN带来良好结局。基线疾病活动度、低补体血症和组织学AI预测治疗反应。AI和CI分别与急性和慢性损伤表现出不同关联。贝利木单抗在预防复发和减少糖皮质激素方面具有显著优势。

items.title: Association between fat-free mass, lipid profile and cardiovascular risk indices in women with systemic lupus erythematosus: a multicenter cross-sectional study.
items.abstract: Women with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) exhibit increased cardiovascular risk, partly explained by adverse fat distribution. This multicenter cross-sectional study investigated whether fat-free mass (FFM) is independently related to lipid metabolism and cardiovascular risk and identified metabolic clusters combining body composition and lipid parameters in women with SLE from an Ibero-American cohort. In this cross-sectional study, clinical, biochemical, anthropometric, and body composition data from 285 adult women with SLE from Brazil, Mexico, and Spain were analyzed. Multivariable linear regression models examined associations between FFM (%) and lipid parameters and cardiovascular risk indices. Model 1 was adjusted for age and center; Model 2 additionally for disease activity and duration; and Model 3 further for hydroxychloroquine dose. Higher FFM was independently associated with a more favorable lipid profile. In the fully adjusted model, FFM was inversely associated with LDL-C (p = 0.032), Castelli I (p = 0.032), Castelli II (p = 0.026), and LAP (p < 0.001), and positively associated with HDL-C (p = 0.048). Associations with triglycerides observed in partially adjusted models were attenuated after full adjustment. In women with SLE, greater fat-free mass was associated with a more favorable lipid profile and selected atherogenic indices, independent of demographic and disease-related factors. Although causality cannot be inferred due to the cross-sectional design, these findings suggest that lean mass may represent an important component of cardiometabolic health in SLE.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮女性患者中无脂质量、血脂谱和心血管风险指数之间的关联：一项多中心横断面研究
items.abstractZh: 患有系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的女性心血管风险增加，部分原因是不利的脂肪分布。这项多中心横断面研究调查了来自伊比利亚-美洲队列的SLE女性中，无脂质量（FFM）是否与脂质代谢和心血管风险独立相关，并确定了结合身体成分和脂质参数的代谢簇。在这项横断面研究中，分析了来自巴西、墨西哥和西班牙的285名成年SLE女性的临床、生化、人体测量和身体成分数据。多变量线性回归模型检验了FFM（%）与血脂参数和心血管风险指数之间的关联。模型1根据年龄和中心进行调整；模型2额外根据疾病活动度和病程进行调整；模型3进一步根据羟氯喹剂量进行调整。较高的FFM与更有利的血脂谱独立相关。在完全调整的模型中，FFM与LDL-C（p = 0.032）、Castelli I（p = 0.032）、Castelli II（p = 0.026）和LAP（p < 0.001）呈负相关，与HDL-C（p = 0.048）呈正相关。在部分调整模型中观察到的与甘油三酯的关联在完全调整后减弱。在SLE女性中，更大的无脂质量与更有利的血脂谱和选定的致动脉粥样硬化指数相关，且独立于人口统计学和疾病相关因素。尽管由于横断面设计无法推断因果关系，但这些发现表明，瘦体重可能是SLE中心脏代谢健康的重要组成部分。

items.title: A Diagnosis of Exclusion - Adult-Onset Still's Disease: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Adult-onset Still's disease (AOSD) is a rare systemic inflammatory disorder characterized by high spiking fevers, arthralgia or arthritis, and a distinctive salmon-colored evanescent rash. Diagnosis is clinical but can pose a challenge for providers given its rarity and variable clinical presentation. Here, the authors present the case of a 58-year-old Caucasian male exhibiting fever, myalgias, hyperferritinemia, polyarthralgia, and diffuse pruritic rash. While a rash is part of the typical presentation for AOSD, the diffuse pruritus seen in this patient is atypical. Several differentials were considered, and infectious, neoplastic, and alternative rheumatologic etiologies were excluded. Despite the pruritic nature of the patient's rash, the Yamaguchi criteria for AOSD was fulfilled. The patient achieved symptomatic improvement after treatment with NSAIDs, antihistamines, and corticosteroids. This case emphasizes the diagnostic challenge AOSD can pose, especially when the presenting symptoms mimic more common conditions such as viral infections, allergic reactions, or autoimmune dermatologic diseases. It reinforces the importance of considering AOSD in the differential diagnosis of patients with persistent fevers, rash, and arthralgia, particularly when infectious and autoimmune workups are unrevealing. Early recognition is crucial, as prompt initiation of therapy can significantly reduce morbidity and prevent complications.

items.titleZh: 排除性诊断——成人斯蒂尔病：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 成人斯蒂尔病（AOSD）是一种罕见的系统性炎症性疾病，其特征为高热、关节痛或关节炎，以及独特的鲑鱼色一过性皮疹。诊断基于临床表现，但由于其罕见性和多变的临床表现，对医生而言可能构成挑战。本文中，作者报告了一例58岁白人男性病例，表现为发热、肌痛、高铁蛋白血症、多关节痛和弥漫性瘙痒性皮疹。虽然皮疹是AOSD典型表现的一部分，但该患者出现的弥漫性瘙痒并不典型。考虑了多种鉴别诊断，并排除了感染性、肿瘤性和其他风湿性病因。尽管患者皮疹具有瘙痒性，但仍符合AOSD的Yamaguchi诊断标准。患者在接受非甾体抗炎药、抗组胺药和皮质类固醇治疗后症状改善。本病例强调了AOSD诊断的挑战性，尤其是当临床表现类似于更常见的疾病如病毒感染、过敏反应或自身免疫性皮肤病时。它强调了在持续发热、皮疹和关节痛患者的鉴别诊断中考虑AOSD的重要性，特别是在感染和自身免疫检查无阳性发现时。早期识别至关重要，因为及时启动治疗可显著降低发病率并预防并发症。
